As our solution to the NTIRE 2026 Image Super-Resolution ($\times 4$) Challenge, the proposed design consistently improves over the base branch and slightly exceeds the pure strong branch in PSNR at the best operating point under a unified DIV2K bicubic $\times 4$ evaluation protocol. Ablation studies confirm that output-level compensation provides a low-overhead and practically accessible upgrade path for existing super-resolution systems.

</details>


### [261] [Finetune Like You Pretrain: Boosting Zero-shot Adversarial Robustness in Vision-language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11576)
*Songlong Xing,Weijie Wang,Zhengyu Zhao,Jindong Gu,Philip Torr,Nicu Sebe*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdvFLYP是一种通过对抗性微调增强CLIP模型鲁棒性的新范式，遵循CLIP预训练方法，使用网络图像-文本对和对比损失，并通过正则化减少对抗图像嵌入的失真。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管CLIP等视觉语言模型具有出色的零样本能力，但它们容易受到对抗攻击。现有的对抗性微调方法通常在ImageNet等代理数据集上微调视觉编码器，但这些方法忽视了训练数据分布和学习目标的重要性，导致零样本能力下降，且鲁棒性的跨域可迁移性有限。

Method: AdvFLYP遵循CLIP预训练的训练方法进行对抗性微调：1) 使用从网络收集的图像-文本对创建对抗图像；2) 通过对比损失将对抗图像与对应文本匹配；3) 引入正则化惩罚对抗图像特征的偏差，其中logit级正则化有利于鲁棒性，特征级正则化有利于干净准确率。

Result: 在涵盖多个领域的14个下游数据集上的广泛实验表明，AdvFLYP范式优于主流实践方法，在保持零样本能力的同时显著提升了对抗鲁棒性。

Conclusion: AdvFLYP通过遵循CLIP预训练方法进行对抗性微调，有效提升了视觉语言模型的对抗鲁棒性，同时保持了其零样本能力，并实现了跨域鲁棒性的良好可迁移性。

Abstract: Despite their impressive zero-shot abilities, vision-language models such as CLIP have been shown to be susceptible to adversarial attacks. To enhance its adversarial robustness, recent studies finetune the pretrained vision encoder of CLIP with adversarial examples on a proxy dataset such as ImageNet by aligning adversarial images with correct class labels. However, these methods overlook the important roles of training data distributions and learning objectives, resulting in reduced zero-shot capabilities and limited transferability of robustness across domains and datasets. In this work, we propose a simple yet effective paradigm AdvFLYP, which follows the training recipe of CLIP's pretraining process when performing adversarial finetuning to the model. Specifically, AdvFLYP finetunes CLIP with adversarial images created based on image-text pairs collected from the web, and match them with their corresponding texts via a contrastive loss. To alleviate distortion of adversarial image embeddings of noisy web images, we further propose to regularise AdvFLYP by penalising deviation of adversarial image features. We show that logit- and feature-level regularisation terms benefit robustness and clean accuracy, respectively. Extensive experiments on 14 downstream datasets spanning various domains show the superiority of our paradigm over mainstream practices. Our code and model weights are released at https://github.com/Sxing2/AdvFLYP.

</details>


### [262] [Seeing Through Touch: Tactile-Driven Visual Localization of Material Regions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11579)
*Seongyu Kim,Seungwoo Lee,Hyeonggon Ryu,Joon Son Chung,Arda Senocak*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过密集跨模态特征交互学习局部视觉-触觉对齐的模型，用于触觉条件材料分割，并通过引入野外多材料场景图像和材料多样性配对策略来解决现有数据集局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-触觉方法依赖全局对齐，无法捕捉触觉定位所需的细粒度局部对应关系，且现有数据集主要是近距离、低多样性的图像，限制了模型的性能。

Method: 提出学习局部视觉-触觉对齐的模型，通过密集跨模态特征交互生成触觉显著性图，用于触觉条件材料分割。引入野外多材料场景图像扩展视觉多样性，采用材料多样性配对策略将每个触觉样本与视觉多样但触觉一致的图像对齐，提升上下文定位和弱信号鲁棒性。

Result: 在新建和现有基准测试中，该方法在触觉定位任务上显著优于先前的视觉-触觉方法。

Conclusion: 通过密集跨模态交互和扩展数据集，该方法有效解决了触觉定位中的局部对齐和视觉多样性不足问题，为触觉条件材料分割提供了更精确的解决方案。

Abstract: We address the problem of tactile localization, where the goal is to identify image regions that share the same material properties as a tactile input. Existing visuo-tactile methods rely on global alignment and thus fail to capture the fine-grained local correspondences required for this task. The challenge is amplified by existing datasets, which predominantly contain close-up, low-diversity images. We propose a model that learns local visuo-tactile alignment via dense cross-modal feature interactions, producing tactile saliency maps for touch-conditioned material segmentation. To overcome dataset constraints, we introduce: (i) in-the-wild multi-material scene images that expand visual diversity, and (ii) a material-diversity pairing strategy that aligns each tactile sample with visually varied yet tactilely consistent images, improving contextual localization and robustness to weak signals. We also construct two new tactile-grounded material segmentation datasets for quantitative evaluation. Experiments on both new and existing benchmarks show that our approach substantially outperforms prior visuo-tactile methods in tactile localization.

</details>


### [263] [MLLM-as-a-Judge Exhibits Model Preference Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11589)
*Shuitsu Koyama,Yuiga Wada,Daichi Yashima,Komei Sugiura*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出Philautia-Eval方法，发现多模态大语言模型作为评估器时存在自我偏好偏差和模型家族间的相互偏好偏差，并提出了Pomms集成方法来缓解这种偏差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前广泛使用MLLM-as-a-Judge方法进行自动评估，但如果这种方法存在偏差，可能会扭曲模型比较和基准驱动的科学进展。需要研究MLLM评估器是否对特定MLLM生成的文本存在偏好偏差。

Method: 提出Philautia-Eval方法，通过分离偏好倾向与生成质量差异来量化偏差程度。收集了来自12个MLLM的129万条字幕-评分对进行分析，并提出了简单的MLLM集成方法Pomms。

Result: 研究发现代表性MLLM倾向于表现出自我偏好偏差，特定模型家族之间存在相互偏好偏差，这可能由重用连接器和重叠的指令调优资源驱动。Pomms集成方法有效缓解了模型特定偏好偏差，同时保持了性能。

Conclusion: MLLM-as-a-Judge方法存在模型特定偏好偏差，需要谨慎使用。提出的Pomms集成方法是缓解这种偏差的有效解决方案，有助于更公平的模型评估。

Abstract: Automatic evaluation using multimodal large language models (MLLMs), commonly referred to as MLLM-as-a-Judge, has been widely used to measure model performance. If such MLLM-as-a-Judge methods were biased, they could distort model comparisons and benchmark-driven scientific progress. However, it remains unclear to what extent MLLM-as-a-Judge methods favor or disfavor text generated by specific MLLMs. In this study, we propose Philautia-Eval to investigate such model-specific preference bias. Philautia-Eval quantifies the degree of the bias by disentangling preference tendencies from differences in generation quality. Using 1.29M caption-score pairs collected from 12 MLLMs, we found that representative MLLMs tend to exhibit self-preference bias. Moreover, experimental results indicate mutual preference bias within particular model families, which is potentially driven by reused connectors and overlapping instruction-tuning resources. Finally, we introduce a simple ensemble of MLLMs, Pomms. Our results demonstrated that Pomms effectively mitigated the model-specific preference bias while maintaining performance.

</details>


### [264] [Learning Robustness at Test-Time from a Non-Robust Teacher](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11590)
*Stefano Bianchettin,Giulio Rossolini,Giorgio Buttazzo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究如何将非鲁棒预训练模型在无标签目标数据上通过测试时适应来提升对抗鲁棒性，提出了一种基于非鲁棒教师预测作为语义锚点的标签无关框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前预训练模型广泛用作通用骨干网络，并通过测试时适应来提升在目标领域的干净准确率，但对抗鲁棒性在这一范式下被忽视，特别是当原始预训练模型本身并非鲁棒设计时。这引出一个实际问题：能否在测试时适应中提升非鲁棒预训练模型在目标分布上的对抗鲁棒性？

Method: 提出一个标签无关框架，利用非鲁棒教师模型的预测作为语义锚点，同时指导干净样本和对抗样本的适应目标。该方法为对抗训练提供了更稳定的替代方案，相比传统的基于自一致性的正则化方法。

Result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet数据集上的实验表明，该方法在诱导的光度变换下实现了更好的优化稳定性、对参数选择的更低敏感性，以及比现有基线更好的鲁棒性-准确性权衡。

Conclusion: 研究表明，即使原始预训练模型不具备鲁棒性，通过适当的测试时适应策略，仍然可以在无标签目标数据上有效提升对抗鲁棒性。提出的基于语义锚点的框架为这一场景提供了稳定有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Nowadays, pretrained models are increasingly used as general-purpose backbones and adapted at test-time to downstream environments where target data are scarce and unlabeled. While this paradigm has proven effective for improving clean accuracy on the target domain, adversarial robustness has received far less attention, especially when the original pretrained model is not explicitly designed to be robust. This raises a practical question: \emph{can a pretrained, non-robust model be adapted at test-time to improve adversarial robustness on a target distribution?} To face this question, this work studies how adversarial training strategies behave when integrated into adaptation schemes for the unsupervised test-time setting, where only a small set of unlabeled target samples is available. It first analyzes how classical adversarial training formulations can be extended to this scenario, showing that straightforward distillation-based adaptations remain unstable and highly sensitive to hyperparameter tuning, particularly when the teacher itself is non-robust.
  To address these limitations, the work proposes a label-free framework that uses the predictions of a non-robust teacher model as a semantic anchor for both the clean and adversarial objectives during adaptation. We further provide theoretical insights showing that our formulation yields a more stable alternative to the self-consistency-based regularization commonly used in classical adversarial training. Experiments evaluate the proposed approach on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet under induced photometric transformations. The results support the theoretical insights by showing that the proposed approach achieves improved optimization stability, lower sensitivity to parameter choices, and a better robustness-accuracy trade-off than existing baselines in this post-deployment test-time setting.

</details>


### [265] [Geoparsing: Diagram Parsing for Plane and Solid Geometry with a Unified Formal Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11600)
*Peijie Wang,Ming-Liang Zhang,Jun Cao,Chao Deng,Dekang Ran,Hongda Sun,Pi Bu,Xuan Zhang,Yingyao Wang,Jun Song,Bo Zheng,Fei Yin,Cheng-Lin Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个统一的形式语言来处理平面和立体几何，构建了GDP-29K数据集，并采用监督微调加可验证奖励的强化学习训练范式，显著提升了多模态大语言模型的几何推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型在几何推理方面存在瓶颈，特别是在需要空间理解的立体几何领域。虽然形式语言有助于平面几何理解，但立体几何的研究仍然不足。

Method: 设计了一个统一的形式语言来整合平面和立体几何；构建了GDP-29K大规模数据集（包含20k平面几何和9k立体几何样本）；提出了结合监督微调和可验证奖励强化学习的训练范式。

Result: 实验表明该方法在解析性能上达到了最先进水平；解析得到的形式描述作为关键认知支架，显著提升了多模态大语言模型在下游几何推理任务中的能力。

Conclusion: 通过统一的形式语言、大规模数据集和创新的训练范式，成功解决了多模态大语言模型在几何推理特别是立体几何方面的瓶颈问题，为几何理解和推理提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but continue to struggle with geometric reasoning, primarily due to the perception bottleneck regarding fine-grained visual elements. While formal languages have aided plane geometry understanding, solid geometry which requires spatial understanding remains largely unexplored. In this paper, we address this challenge by designing a unified formal language that integrates plane and solid geometry, comprehensively covering geometric structures and semantic relations. We construct GDP-29K, a large-scale dataset comprising 20k plane and 9k solid geometry samples collected from diverse real-world sources, each paired with its ground-truth formal description. To ensure syntactic correctness and geometric consistency, we propose a training paradigm that combines Supervised Fine-Tuning with Reinforcement Learning via Verifiable Rewards. Experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art parsing performance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that our parsed formal descriptions serve as a critical cognitive scaffold, significantly boosting MLLMs' capabilities for downstream geometry reasoning tasks. Our data and code are available at Geoparsing.

</details>


### [266] [POINTS-Long: Adaptive Dual-Mode Visual Reasoning in MLLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11627)
*Haicheng Wang,Yuan Liu,Yikun Liu,Zhemeng Yu,Zhongyin Zhao,Yangxiu You,Zilin Yu,Le Tian,Xiao Zhou,Jie Zhou,Weidi Xie,Yanfeng Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: POINTS-Long 是一种原生双模态多模态大语言模型，通过动态视觉令牌缩放技术解决长视频和流式场景中的视觉令牌序列爆炸问题，提供聚焦模式和待机模式来平衡效率与精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在跨模态理解和生成方面表现出色，但长视频和流媒体场景中视觉令牌序列的快速增长对其可扩展性和实际部署构成了重大挑战。

Method: 提出 POINTS-Long 模型，采用受人类视觉系统启发的动态视觉令牌缩放技术，支持两种互补的感知模式：聚焦模式（保持最优性能）和待机模式（大幅减少视觉令牌）。通过动态可分离的 KV 缓存设计原生支持流式视觉理解。

Result: 在细粒度视觉任务中，聚焦模式保持最佳性能；在长形式通用视觉理解任务中，待机模式仅使用原始视觉令牌的 1/40-1/10，就能保留 97.7-99.7% 的原始准确率。模型支持高效维护超长视觉记忆的流式理解。

Conclusion: POINTS-Long 为未来多模态大语言模型的设计提供了新思路，为自适应和高效的长形式视觉理解奠定了基础。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have recently demonstrated remarkable capabilities in cross-modal understanding and generation. However, the rapid growth of visual token sequences--especially in long-video and streaming scenarios--poses a major challenge to their scalability and real-world deployment. Thus, we introduce POINTS-Long, a native dual-mode MLLM featuring dynamic visual token scaling inspired by the human visual system. The model supports two complementary perception modes: focus mode and standby mode, enabling users to dynamically trade off efficiency and accuracy during inference. On fine-grained visual tasks, the focus mode retains the optimal performance, while on long-form general visual understanding, the standby mode retains 97.7-99.7% of the original accuracy using only 1/40-1/10th of the visual tokens. Moreover, POINTS-Long natively supports streaming visual understanding via a dynamically detachable KV-cache design, allowing efficient maintenance of ultra-long visual memory. Our work provides new insights into the design of future MLLMs and lays the foundation for adaptive and efficient long-form visual understanding.

</details>


### [267] [MorphoFlow: Sparse-Supervised Generative Shape Modeling with Adaptive Latent Relevance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11636)
*Mokshagna Sai Teja Karanam,Tushar Kataria,Shireen Elhabian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MorphoFlow是一种稀疏监督的生成式形状建模框架，直接从稀疏表面标注学习紧凑的概率形状表示，无需密集分割标注或固定潜在表示。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统统计形状建模方法依赖密集标注分割和固定潜在表示，限制了可扩展性且难以建模复杂解剖变异。需要一种能从稀疏标注学习、更灵活的形状建模方法。

Method: 结合神经隐式形状表示、自解码器公式和自回归归一化流。神经隐式表示支持分辨率无关的3D解剖建模；自解码器支持稀疏监督下直接优化每个实例的潜在代码；自回归流捕获潜在解剖变异分布，提供基于似然的生成模型；通过稀疏诱导先验引入自适应潜在相关性加权，调节各维度贡献。

Result: 在公开的腰椎和股骨数据集上评估，显示能从稀疏输入准确重建高分辨率形状，并能恢复与群体趋势一致的结构化解剖变异模式。支持不确定性量化和解剖学合理的形状合成。

Conclusion: MorphoFlow提供了一个可扩展、灵活的统计形状建模框架，直接从稀疏标注学习紧凑的概率形状表示，无需手动调整潜在维度，在保持生成表达能力的同时实现结构化潜在表示。

Abstract: Statistical shape modeling (SSM) is central to population level analysis of anatomical variability, yet most existing approaches rely on densely annotated segmentations and fixed latent representations. These requirements limit scalability and reduce flexibility when modeling complex anatomical variation. We introduce MorphoFlow, a sparse supervised generative shape modeling framework that learns compact probabilistic shape representations directly from sparse surface annotations. MorphoFlow integrates neural implicit shape representations with an autodecoder formulation and autoregressive normalizing flows to learn an expressive probabilistic density over the latent shape space. The neural implicit representation enables resolution-agnostic modeling of 3D anatomy, while the autodecoder formulation supports direct optimization of per-instance latent codes under sparse supervision. The autoregressive flow captures the distribution of latent anatomical variability providing a tractable, likelihood-based generative model of shapes. To promote compact and structured latent representations, we incorporate adaptive latent relevance weighting through sparsity-inducing priors, enabling the model to regulate the contribution of individual latent dimensions according to their relevance to the underlying anatomical variation while preserving generative expressivity. The resulting latent space supports uncertainty quantification and anatomically plausible shape synthesis without manual latent dimensionality tuning. Evaluation on publicly available lumbar vertebrae and femur datasets demonstrates accurate high-resolution reconstruction from sparse inputs and recovery of structured modes of anatomical variation consistent with population level trends.

</details>


### [268] [STS-Mixer: Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer for 4D Point Cloud Video Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11637)
*Wenhao Li,Xueying Jiang,Gongjie Zhang,Xiaoqin Zhang,Ling Shao,Shijian Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: STS-Mixer：首个从谱域角度处理4D点云视频的统一框架，通过图谱信号分解捕获几何特征，在3D动作识别和4D语义分割任务上取得优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有4D点云视频方法主要在时空域工作，难以捕捉底层几何特征，导致表示学习和理解效果受限。本文从互补的谱域视角出发，通过图谱变换分解不同频带信号来捕获点云视频的几何结构。

Method: 将4D点云视频转换为图谱信号，分解为多个频带（低频捕获粗形状，高频捕获细粒度几何细节）。设计STS-Mixer框架，混合空间、时间和谱域表示，整合多频带谱信号与时空信息。

Result: 在多个广泛采用的基准测试中，STS-Mixer在3D动作识别和4D语义分割任务上均取得了一致的优越性能。

Conclusion: 从谱域角度处理4D点云视频能有效捕获几何特征，STS-Mixer框架通过混合空间、时间和谱域表示，实现了对4D点云视频的细粒度和整体理解。

Abstract: 4D point cloud videos capture rich spatial and temporal dynamics of scenes which possess unique values in various 4D understanding tasks. However, most existing methods work in the spatiotemporal domain where the underlying geometric characteristics of 4D point cloud videos are hard to capture, leading to degraded representation learning and understanding of 4D point cloud videos. We address the above challenge from a complementary spectral perspective. By transforming 4D point cloud videos into graph spectral signals, we can decompose them into multiple frequency bands each of which captures distinct geometric structures of point cloud videos. Our spectral analysis reveals that the decomposed low-frequency signals capture more coarse shapes while high-frequency signals encode more fine-grained geometry details. Building on these observations, we design Spatio-Temporal-Spectral Mixer (STS-Mixer), a unified framework that mixes spatial, temporal, and spectral representations of point cloud videos. STS-Mixer integrates multi-band delineated spectral signals with spatiotemporal information to capture rich geometries and temporal dynamics, while enabling fine-grained and holistic understanding of 4D point cloud videos. Extensive experiments show that STS-Mixer achieves superior performance consistently across multiple widely adopted benchmarks on both 3D action recognition and 4D semantic segmentation tasks. Code and models are available at https://github.com/Vegetebird/STS-Mixer.

</details>


### [269] [GazeVaLM: A Multi-Observer Eye-Tracking Benchmark for Evaluating Clinical Realism in AI-Generated X-Rays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11653)
*David Wong,Zeynep Isik,Bin Wang,Marouane Tliba,Gorkem Durak,Elif Keles,Halil Ertugrul Aktas,Aladine Chetouani,Cagdas Topel,Nicolo Gennaro,Camila Lopes Vendrami,Tugce Agirlar Trabzonlu,Amir Ali Rahsepar,Laetitia Perronne,Matthew Antalek,Onural Ozturk,Gokcan Okur,Andrew C. Gordon,Ayis Pyrros,Frank H. Miller,Amir Borhani,Hatice Savas,Eric Hart,Elizabeth Krupinski,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GazeVaLM是一个公开的眼动追踪数据集，用于研究胸部X光片真实性评估中的临床感知，包含放射科专家的眼动数据和多模态大语言模型的预测结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究需要理解专家和AI系统如何感知、解释和评估医学图像，特别是在生成式AI生成图像日益普及的背景下，需要比较人类专家与AI在临床决策和图像真实性判断方面的差异。

Method: 收集了16名放射科专家对30张真实和30张AI生成胸部X光片的960个眼动记录，包括两种任务条件：诊断评估和真实性分类。同时将相同协议扩展到6个最先进的多模态大语言模型，收集其预测结果。

Result: 提供了包括原始注视样本、注视点图、扫描路径、显著性密度图、结构化诊断标签和真实性判断在内的完整数据集。还提供了眼动一致性分析、观察者间一致性分析，以及放射科专家与大语言模型在诊断准确性和真实性检测方面的基准比较。

Conclusion: GazeVaLM数据集支持眼动建模、临床决策、人机比较、生成图像真实性评估和不确定性量化研究，通过联合发布视觉注意数据、临床标签和模型预测，旨在促进关于专家和AI系统如何感知、解释和评估医学图像的可重复研究。

Abstract: We introduce GazeVaLM, a public eye-tracking dataset for studying clinical perception during chest radiograph authenticity assessment. The dataset comprises 960 gaze recordings from 16 expert radiologists interpreting 30 real and 30 synthetic chest X-rays (generated by diffusion based generative AI) under two conditions: diagnostic assessment and real-fake classification (Visual Turing test). For each image-observer pair, we provide raw gaze samples, fixation maps, scanpaths, saliency density maps, structured diagnostic labels, and authenticity judgments. We extend the protocol to 6 state-of-the-art multimodal LLMs, releasing their predicted diagnoses, authenticity labels, and confidence scores under matched conditions - enabling direct human-AI comparison at both decision and uncertainty levels. We further provide analyses of gaze agreement, inter-observer consistency, and benchmarking of radiologists versus LLMs in diagnostic accuracy and authenticity detection. GazeVaLM supports research in gaze modeling, clinical decision-making, human-AI comparison, generative image realism assessment, and uncertainty quantification. By jointly releasing visual attention data, clinical labels, and model predictions, we aim to facilitate reproducible research on how experts and AI systems perceive, interpret, and evaluate medical images. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/davidcwong/GazeVaLM.

</details>


### [270] [UNIGEOCLIP: Unified Geospatial Contrastive Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11668)
*Guillaume Astruc,Eduard Trulls,Jan Hosang,Loic Landrieu,Paul-Edouard Sarlin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UNIGEOCLIP是一个大规模多模态对比学习框架，联合对齐五种互补的地理空间模态（航空影像、街景、高程模型、文本和地理坐标）到统一嵌入空间，通过全对比对齐实现跨模态检索和推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着航空影像、街景、高程模型、文本和地理坐标等多模态地理空间数据的日益丰富，需要一个能够联合对齐这些互补模态的统一表示学习框架，以更好地支持跨模态的地理空间理解和推理。

Method: 提出UNIGEOCLIP框架，采用全对比对齐方法（all-to-all contrastive alignment）将五种地理空间模态映射到统一嵌入空间，而不是依赖中心枢纽表示或简单融合。同时设计了缩放经纬度编码器来捕捉多尺度地理结构，提升空间表示能力。

Result: 在多个下游地理空间任务上的实验表明，UNIGEOCLIP consistently outperforms single-modality contrastive models and coordinate-only baselines，凸显了整体多模态地理空间对齐的优势。

Conclusion: UNIGEOCLIP通过全对比对齐实现了五种地理空间模态的统一表示学习，其统一的嵌入空间支持任意模态组合的比较、检索和推理，为多模态地理空间分析提供了有效框架。

Abstract: The growing availability of co-located geospatial data spanning aerial imagery, street-level views, elevation models, text, and geographic coordinates offers a unique opportunity for multimodal representation learning. We introduce UNIGEOCLIP, a massively multimodal contrastive framework to jointly align five complementary geospatial modalities in a single unified embedding space. Unlike prior approaches that fuse modalities or rely on a central pivot representation, our method performs all-to-all contrastive alignment, enabling seamless comparison, retrieval, and reasoning across arbitrary combinations of modalities. We further propose a scaled latitude-longitude encoder that improves spatial representation by capturing multi-scale geographic structure. Extensive experiments across downstream geospatial tasks demonstrate that UNIGEOCLIP consistently outperforms single-modality contrastive models and coordinate-only baselines, highlighting the benefits of holistic multimodal geospatial alignment. A reference implementation is available at https://gastruc.github.io/unigeoclip.

</details>


### [271] [Towards Brain MRI Foundation Models for the Clinic: Findings from the FOMO25 Challenge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11679)
*Asbjørn Munk,Stefano Cerri,Vardan Nersesjan,Christian Hedeager Krag,Jakob Ambsdorf,Pablo Rocamora García,Julia Machnio,Peirong Liu,Suhyun Ahn,Nasrin Akbari,Yasmina Al Khalil,Kimberly Amador,Sina Amirrajab,Tal Arbel,Meritxell Bach Cuadra,Ujjwal Baid,Bhakti Baheti,Jaume Banus,Kamil Barbierik,Christoph Brune,Yansong Bu,Baptiste Callard,Yuhan Chen,Cornelius Crijnen,Corentin Dancette,Peter Drotar,Prasad Dutande,Nils D. Forkert,Saurabh Garg,Jakub Gazda,Matej Gazda,Benoît Gérin,Partha Ghosh,Weikang Gong,Pedro M. Gordaliza,Sam Hashemi,Tobias Heimann,Fucang Jia,Jiexin Jiang,Emily Kaczmarek,Chris Kang,Seung Kwan Kang,Mohammad Khazaei,Julien Khlaut,Petros Koutsouvelis,Jae Sung Lee,Yuchong Li,Mengye Lyu,Mingchen Ma,Anant Madabhushi,Klaus H. Maier-Hein,Pierre Manceron,Andrés Martínez Mora,Moona Mazher,Felix Meister,Nataliia Molchanova,Steven A. Niederer,Leonard Nürnberg,Jinah Park,Abdul Qayyum,Jonas Richiardi,Antoine Saporta,Branislav Setlak,Ning Shen,Justin Szeto,Constantin Ulrich,Puru Vaish,Vibujithan Vigneshwaran,Leroy Volmer,Zihao Wang,Siqi Wei,Anthony Winder,Jelmer M. Wolterink,Maxence Wynen,Chang Yang,Si Young Yie,Mostafa Mehdipour Ghazi,Akshay Pai,Espen Jimenez Solem,Sebastian Nørgaard Llambias,Mikael Boesen,Michael Eriksen Benros,Juan Eugenio Iglesias,Mads Nielsen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: FOMO25挑战赛通过大规模无监督预训练数据集FOMO60K，评估了脑MRI基础模型在临床数据中的泛化能力，发现自监督预训练能提升跨域泛化性能，但不同任务需要不同的预训练目标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床脑MRI分析面临数据异构、噪声大且高质量标签成本高的问题。自监督学习可利用大量无标签临床数据训练鲁棒的基础模型，但现有脑MRI基础模型发展受限于小规模预训练数据集和局限于高质量研究数据的评估。

Method: 组织FOMO25挑战赛，提供大规模预训练数据集FOMO60K，在少样本和跨域设置下评估模型。任务包括梗死分类、脑膜瘤分割和脑年龄回归，分为方法赛道（仅用FOMO60K）和开放赛道（可用任何数据）。使用标准化容器化流水线评估19个基础模型。

Result: 1）自监督预训练提升临床数据在域偏移下的泛化能力，最强的跨域训练模型超越在域训练的监督基线；2）没有单一预训练目标适合所有任务：MAE适合分割，混合重建-对比目标适合分类；3）小型预训练模型表现良好，扩大模型规模和训练时长未带来可靠收益。

Conclusion: 自监督预训练对临床脑MRI分析的泛化能力有显著提升，但需要根据具体任务选择合适的预训练目标。模型规模和训练时长的扩展不一定带来性能增益，小型高效模型在临床部署中具有实用价值。

Abstract: Clinical deployment of automated brain MRI analysis faces a fundamental challenge: clinical data is heterogeneous and noisy, and high-quality labels are prohibitively costly to obtain. Self-supervised learning (SSL) can address this by leveraging the vast amounts of unlabeled data produced in clinical workflows to train robust \textit{foundation models} that adapt out-of-domain with minimal supervision. However, the development of foundation models for brain MRI has been limited by small pretraining datasets and in-domain benchmarking focused on high-quality, research-grade data. To address this gap, we organized the FOMO25 challenge as a satellite event at MICCAI 2025. FOMO25 provided participants with a large pretraining dataset, FOMO60K, and evaluated models on data sourced directly from clinical workflows in few-shot and out-of-domain settings. Tasks covered infarct classification, meningioma segmentation, and brain age regression, and considered both models trained on FOMO60K (method track) and any data (open track). Nineteen foundation models from sixteen teams were evaluated using a standardized containerized pipeline. Results show that (a) self-supervised pretraining improves generalization on clinical data under domain shift, with the strongest models trained \textit{out-of-domain} surpassing supervised baselines trained \textit{in-domain}. (b) No single pretraining objective benefits all tasks: MAE favors segmentation, hybrid reconstruction-contrastive objectives favor classification, and (c) strong performance was achieved by small pretrained models, and improvements from scaling model size and training duration did not yield reliable benefits.

</details>


### [272] [Unfolding 3D Gaussian Splatting via Iterative Gaussian Synopsis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11685)
*Yuqin Lu,Yang Zhou,Yihua Dai,Guiqing Li,Shengfeng He*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Iterative Gaussian Synopsis框架，通过自上而下的"展开"方案实现紧凑且渐进式的3DGS渲染，解决存储和资源限制问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS虽然实现了实时高质量新视角合成，但其巨大的存储需求和非结构化表示在流式传输和资源受限环境中面临挑战。现有的自底向上LOD策略通常引入冗余或导致质量下降。

Method: 提出Iterative Gaussian Synopsis框架，从全分辨率3DGS模型开始，使用自适应可学习的基于掩码的剪枝机制迭代生成更粗糙的LOD。结合分层空间网格（捕捉全局场景结构）和共享Anchor Codebook（建模局部细节），创建紧凑且富有表现力的特征表示。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在所有LOD级别上都保持了高渲染质量，同时实现了显著的存储减少，证明了在带宽和内存受限场景中实时3DGS渲染的实用性和可扩展性。

Conclusion: Iterative Gaussian Synopsis通过自上而下的展开机制，构建了紧凑的多层次表示，有效解决了3DGS的存储和部署挑战，为资源受限环境中的实时渲染提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has become a state-of-the-art framework for real-time, high-fidelity novel view synthesis. However, its substantial storage requirements and inherently unstructured representation pose challenges for deployment in streaming and resource-constrained environments. Existing Level-of-Detail (LOD) strategies, particularly those based on bottom-up construction, often introduce redundancy or lead to fidelity degradation. To overcome these limitations, we propose Iterative Gaussian Synopsis, a novel framework for compact and progressive rendering through a top-down "unfolding" scheme. Our approach begins with a full-resolution 3DGS model and iteratively derives coarser LODs using an adaptive, learnable mask-based pruning mechanism. This process constructs a multi-level hierarchy that preserves visual quality while improving efficiency. We integrate hierarchical spatial grids, which capture the global scene structure, with a shared Anchor Codebook that models localized details. This combination produces a compact yet expressive feature representation, designed to minimize redundancy and support efficient, level-specific adaptation. The unfolding mechanism promotes inter-layer reusability and requires only minimal data overhead for progressive refinement. Experiments show that our method maintains high rendering quality across all LODs while achieving substantial storage reduction. These results demonstrate the practicality and scalability of our approach for real-time 3DGS rendering in bandwidth- and memory-constrained scenarios.

</details>


### [273] [Representations Before Pixels: Semantics-Guided Hierarchical Video Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11707)
*Efstathios Karypidis,Spyros Gidaris,Nikos Komodakis*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Re2Pix：两阶段视频预测框架，先预测语义表示再生成视觉内容，通过语义优先设计提升自动驾驶场景中的预测质量和一致性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂动态环境（如自动驾驶）中的视频预测需要同时保证高视觉保真度和场景语义一致性。传统方法直接预测RGB帧难以兼顾这两方面，特别是长期预测时语义一致性容易崩溃。

Method: 采用分层框架：第一阶段在冻结视觉基础模型的特征空间中预测未来场景语义表示；第二阶段以预测的语义表示为条件，使用潜在扩散模型生成逼真帧。为解决训练-测试不匹配问题，引入嵌套dropout和混合监督两种条件策略。

Result: 在具有挑战性的驾驶基准测试中，Re2Pix相比强基线扩散模型显著提升了时间语义一致性、感知质量和训练效率。

Conclusion: 语义优先的设计通过分离场景动态和外观生成，为复杂动态环境中的视频预测提供了有效解决方案，代码已开源。

Abstract: Accurate future video prediction requires both high visual fidelity and consistent scene semantics, particularly in complex dynamic environments such as autonomous driving. We present Re2Pix, a hierarchical video prediction framework that decomposes forecasting into two stages: semantic representation prediction and representation-guided visual synthesis. Instead of directly predicting future RGB frames, our approach first forecasts future scene structure in the feature space of a frozen vision foundation model, and then conditions a latent diffusion model on these predicted representations to render photorealistic frames. This decomposition enables the model to focus first on scene dynamics and then on appearance generation. A key challenge arises from the train-test mismatch between ground-truth representations available during training and predicted ones used at inference. To address this, we introduce two conditioning strategies, nested dropout and mixed supervision, that improve robustness to imperfect autoregressive predictions. Experiments on challenging driving benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed semantics-first design significantly improves temporal semantic consistency, perceptual quality, and training efficiency compared to strong diffusion baselines. We provide the implementation code at https://github.com/Sta8is/Re2Pix

</details>


### [274] [Seeing Through the Tool: A Controlled Benchmark for Occlusion Robustness in Foundation Segmentation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11711)
*Nhan Ho,Luu Le,Thanh-Huy Nguyen,Thien Nguyen,Xiaofeng Liu,Ulas Bagci*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了OccSAM-Bench基准，用于评估SAM系列模型在手术内窥镜中的遮挡鲁棒性，发现模型可分为遮挡感知型和遮挡不可知型两种类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在临床内窥镜中，目标结构被手术器械或重叠组织部分遮挡是一个关键但未被充分探索的挑战，现有基础分割模型在这一问题上的表现需要系统评估。

Method: 提出了OccSAM-Bench基准，模拟两种遮挡类型（手术工具覆盖和切除）和三个校准严重程度，在三个公共息肉数据集上进行评估。采用新颖的三区域评估协议，将分割性能分解为完整、仅可见和不可见目标的评估。

Result: 发现了两种不同的模型原型：遮挡感知模型（SAM、SAM 2、SAM 3、MedSAM3）优先考虑可见组织划分并拒绝器械；遮挡不可知模型（MedSAM、MedSAM2）则自信地预测到遮挡区域。SAM-Med2D与两者都不符，在所有条件下表现不佳。

Conclusion: 遮挡鲁棒性在不同架构中并不一致，模型选择必须基于特定的临床意图——无论是优先考虑保守的可见组织分割，还是隐藏解剖结构的非模态推理。

Abstract: Occlusion, where target structures are partially hidden by surgical instruments or overlapping tissues, remains a critical yet underexplored challenge for foundation segmentation models in clinical endoscopy. We introduce OccSAM-Bench, a benchmark designed to systematically evaluate SAM-family models under controlled, synthesized surgical occlusion. Our framework simulates two occlusion types (i.e., surgical tool overlay and cutout) across three calibrated severity levels on three public polyp datasets. We propose a novel three-region evaluation protocol that decomposes segmentation performance into full, visible-only, and invisible targets. This metric exposes behaviors that standard amodal evaluation obscures, revealing two distinct model archetypes: Occluder-Aware models (SAM, SAM 2, SAM 3, MedSAM3), which prioritize visible tissue delineation and reject instruments, and Occluder-Agnostic models (MedSAM, MedSAM2), which confidently predict into occluded regions. SAM-Med2D aligns with neither and underperforms across all conditions. Ultimately, our results demonstrate that occlusion robustness is not uniform across architectures, and model selection must be driven by specific clinical intent-whether prioritizing conservative visible-tissue segmentation or the amodal inference of hidden anatomy.

</details>


### [275] [BEM: Training-Free Background Embedding Memory for False-Positive Suppression in Real-Time Fixed-Background Camera](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11714)
*Junwoo Park,Jangho Lee,Sunho Lim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出BEM模块，一种无训练、权重冻结的轻量级模块，可附加到预训练检测器上，利用固定摄像头环境中的准静态背景先验来抑制误检，提高在密集单类或少类场景下的检测精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 预训练检测器在COCO等基准上表现良好，但在实际部署中常因训练数据与目标环境分布差异而性能下降。COCO类基准强调类别多样性而非实例密度，导致训练于稀疏每类场景的检测器在密集单类或少类场景（如监控、交通监测）中表现不佳。固定摄像头环境中的准静态背景提供了稳定的无标签先验，可在推理时利用来抑制虚假检测

Method: 提出背景嵌入记忆（BEM）模块：1）估计干净背景嵌入；2）维护原型记忆；3）使用逆相似度、秩加权惩罚重新评分检测logits。BEM是轻量级、无需训练、权重冻结的模块，可附加到预训练检测器上在推理时使用

Result: 在YOLO和RT-DETR系列模型上，在LLVIP和模拟监控流上测试，BEM能持续减少误检，同时保持实时性能。经验上，背景帧余弦相似度与物体数量负相关，与精度-置信度AUC正相关，验证了其作为无训练控制信号的有效性

Conclusion: BEM模块有效利用了固定摄像头环境中的准静态背景先验，通过重新评分检测logits来抑制虚假检测，在密集单类或少类场景中显著提高检测精度，同时保持预训练检测器的实时性能

Abstract: Pretrained detectors perform well on benchmarks but often suffer performance degradation in real-world deployments due to distribution gaps between training data and target environments. COCO-like benchmarks emphasize category diversity rather than instance density, causing detectors trained under per-class sparsity to struggle in dense, single- or few-class scenes such as surveillance and traffic monitoring. In fixed-camera environments, the quasi-static background provides a stable, label-free prior that can be exploited at inference to suppress spurious detections. To address the issue, we propose Background Embedding Memory (BEM), a lightweight, training-free, weight-frozen module that can be attached to pretrained detectors during inference. BEM estimates clean background embeddings, maintains a prototype memory, and re-scores detection logits with an inverse-similarity, rank-weighted penalty, effectively reducing false positives while maintaining recall. Empirically, background-frame cosine similarity correlates negatively with object count and positively with Precision-Confidence AUC (P-AUC), motivating its use as a training-free control signal. Across YOLO and RT-DETR families on LLVIP and simulated surveillance streams, BEM consistently reduces false positives while preserving real-time performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/Leo-Park1214/Background-Embedding-Memory.git

</details>


### [276] [On the Robustness of Watermarking for Autoregressive Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11720)
*Andreas Müller,Denis Lukovnikov,Shingo Kodama,Minh Pham,Anubhav Jain,Jonathan Petit,Niv Cohen,Asja Fischer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AR图像生成器水印方案存在严重漏洞，攻击者无需访问原始模型参数或水印密钥，仅凭单个水印图像即可有效实施水印移除和伪造攻击，无法可靠支持合成内容检测和数据集过滤。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着自回归图像生成器的普及，需要可靠的水印技术来检测和溯源其输出，以应对错误信息传播，并从训练数据中过滤合成图像以防止模型崩溃。然而现有水印方案的安全性尚未得到充分验证。

Method: 研究自回归模型水印方案的脆弱性，评估现有攻击方法，并提出三种新攻击：(1) 向量量化再生移除攻击，(2) 基于对抗优化的攻击，(3) 频率注入攻击。攻击者仅需单个水印参考图像，无需访问模型参数或水印密钥。

Result: 评估显示移除和伪造攻击都能有效实施，现有水印方案无法可靠支持合成内容检测用于数据集过滤。此外，水印模仿攻击使攻击者能够操纵真实图像模仿生成器的水印，触发错误检测以阻止其进入未来模型训练。

Conclusion: 当前自回归图像生成的水印方案存在严重安全漏洞，攻击者能够轻易绕过检测机制。这削弱了水印在应对错误信息和防止模型崩溃方面的实际效用，需要更鲁棒的水印方案设计。

Abstract: The proliferation of autoregressive (AR) image generators demands reliable detection and attribution of their outputs to mitigate misinformation, and to filter synthetic images from training data to prevent model collapse. To address this need, watermarking techniques, specifically designed for AR models, embed a subtle signal at generation time, enabling downstream verification through a corresponding watermark detector. In this work, we study these schemes and demonstrate their vulnerability to both watermark removal and forgery attacks. We assess existing attacks and further introduce three new attacks: (i) a vector-quantized regeneration removal attack, (ii) adversarial optimization-based attack, and (iii) a frequency injection attack. Our evaluation reveals that removal and forgery attacks can be effective with access to a single watermarked reference image and without access to original model parameters or watermarking secrets. Our findings indicate that existing watermarking schemes for AR image generation do not reliably support synthetic content detection for dataset filtering. Moreover, they enable Watermark Mimicry, whereby authentic images can be manipulated to imitate a generator's watermark and trigger false detection to prevent their inclusion in future model training.

</details>


### [277] [The Devil is in the Details -- From OCR for Old Church Slavonic to Purely Visual Stemma Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11724)
*Armin Hoenen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究比较了多种OCR系统（包括传统、机器学习和LLM）对18世纪晚期手写教会斯拉夫语手稿的识别效果，测试了LLM后处理和智能OCR架构，并开发了一种基于图像处理的自动词干分析方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能时代为OCR和词干分析（stemmatology）带来了新的可能性和挑战。研究旨在探索如何利用先进技术提高对历史手稿（特别是教会斯拉夫语手稿）的OCR识别准确率，并开发新的自动化词干分析方法来辅助文本谱系研究。

Method: 1. OCR比较：测试10多个CS OCR系统（包括2个LLM：GPT5和Gemini3-flash）对约6000字符的18世纪晚期手写教会斯拉夫语手稿的识别效果；2. 后处理评估：测试LLM后处理效果；3. 智能OCR架构：测试专用后处理代理、智能管道和RAG架构；4. 词干分析新方法：提出基于图像处理的自动化流程，包括视觉字形提取、聚类、成对统计比较，生成距离矩阵和词干图，并在两个小型语料库（14-16世纪教会斯拉夫语《马可福音》和14-15世纪法语《玫瑰传奇》）上应用。

Result: 实验表明，教会斯拉夫语基本字母的CER（字符错误率）可低至2-3%，但复杂的变音符号仍存在问题。基于图像处理的词干分析方法在小型语料库上证明了基本可行性，为OCR如何支持下游的词干分析任务提供了新思路。

Conclusion: AI技术（特别是LLM和智能架构）能显著提升历史手稿OCR的准确率，但复杂变音符号仍是挑战。新提出的基于图像处理的词干分析方法为文本谱系研究提供了自动化解决方案，展示了AI在数字人文学科中的应用潜力。

Abstract: The age of artificial intelligence has brought many new possibilities and pitfalls in many fields and tasks. The devil is in the details, and those come to the fore when building new pipelines and executing small practical experiments. OCR and stemmatology are no exception. The current investigation starts comparing a range of OCR-systems, from classical over machine learning to LLMs, for roughly 6,000 characters of late handwritten church slavonic manuscripts from the 18th century. Focussing on basic letter correctness, more than 10 CS OCR-systems among which 2 LLMs (GPT5 and Gemini3-flash) are being compared. Then, post-processing via LLMs is assessed and finally, different agentic OCR architectures (specialized post-processing agents, an agentic pipeline and RAG) are tested. With new technology elaborated, experiments suggest, church slavonic CER for basic letters may reach as low as 2-3% but elaborated diacritics could still present a problem. How well OCR can prime stemmatology as a downstream task is the entry point to the second part of the article which introduces a new stemmatic method based solely on image processing. Here, a pipeline of automated visual glyph extraction, clustering and pairwise statistical comparison leading to a distance matrix and ultimately a stemma, is being presented and applied to two small corpora, one for the church slavonic Gospel of Mark from the 14th to 16th centuries, one for the Roman de la Rose in French from the 14th and 15th centuries. Basic functioning of the method can be demonstrated.

</details>


### [278] [Learning Long-term Motion Embeddings for Efficient Kinematics Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11737)
*Nick Stracke,Kolja Bauer,Stefan Andreas Baumann,Miguel Angel Bautista,Josh Susskind,Björn Ommer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种高效的运动建模方法，通过从跟踪器模型获取的大规模轨迹数据中学习长期运动嵌入，实现了比传统视频生成更高效的多未来场景预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然现代视频模型在场景动态理解方面表现出色，但通过完整的视频合成来探索多种可能未来仍然效率低下且计算成本高昂。需要一种更高效的方法来建模场景动态并预测多种可能结果。

Method: 首先从大规模跟踪器模型轨迹中学习高度压缩的运动嵌入（时间压缩因子达64倍），然后在该空间中训练条件流匹配模型，根据文本提示或空间触点的任务描述生成运动潜在表示。

Result: 该方法生成的运动分布优于现有最先进的视频模型和专门的任务特定方法，能够高效生成长时间、真实的运动序列来满足特定目标。

Conclusion: 通过直接操作长期运动嵌入而非完整视频合成，该方法实现了数量级更高效的运动建模，为视觉智能中的动态理解和预测提供了新的高效途径。

Abstract: Understanding and predicting motion is a fundamental component of visual intelligence. Although modern video models exhibit strong comprehension of scene dynamics, exploring multiple possible futures through full video synthesis remains prohibitively inefficient. We model scene dynamics orders of magnitude more efficiently by directly operating on a long-term motion embedding that is learned from large-scale trajectories obtained from tracker models. This enables efficient generation of long, realistic motions that fulfill goals specified via text prompts or spatial pokes. To achieve this, we first learn a highly compressed motion embedding with a temporal compression factor of 64x. In this space, we train a conditional flow-matching model to generate motion latents conditioned on task descriptions. The resulting motion distributions outperform those of both state-of-the-art video models and specialized task-specific approaches.

</details>


### [279] [Efficient KernelSHAP Explanations for Patch-based 3D Medical Image Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11775)
*Ricardo Coimbra Brioso,Giulio Sichili,Damiano Dei,Nicola Lambri,Pietro Mancosu,Marta Scorsetti,Daniele Loiacono*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出高效KernelSHAP框架用于3D CT分割解释性分析，通过ROI限制、感受野裁剪和补丁logit缓存加速计算，并比较不同特征抽象方法在临床可解释性上的权衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于扰动的解释性方法（如KernelSHAP）在3D医学图像分割中计算成本过高，需要大量联盟评估和滑动窗口推理，难以实际应用

Method: 提出高效KernelSHAP框架：1) 将计算限制在用户定义的感兴趣区域及其感受野支持；2) 通过补丁logit缓存加速推理，重用未受影响补丁的基线预测；3) 比较三种自动生成的特征抽象：整个器官单元、规则FCC超体素、混合器官感知超体素；4) 研究多种聚合/值函数，针对稳定证据或假阳性行为

Result: 缓存显著减少冗余计算（计算节省15%-30%）；忠实性和可解释性存在明显权衡：规则超体素在基于扰动的指标上表现最佳但缺乏解剖对齐，器官感知单元产生更具临床可解释性的解释，在标准化指标下特别有效突出假阳性驱动因素

Conclusion: 提出的高效KernelSHAP框架使3D医学图像分割解释性分析变得实用，器官感知特征抽象在临床可解释性方面优于规则超体素，特别适用于识别假阳性驱动因素，为临床决策提供更有意义的解释

Abstract: Perturbation-based explainability methods such as KernelSHAP provide model-agnostic attributions but are typically impractical for patch-based 3D medical image segmentation due to the large number of coalition evaluations and the high cost of sliding-window inference. We present an efficient KernelSHAP framework for volumetric CT segmentation that restricts computation to a user-defined region of interest and its receptive-field support, and accelerates inference via patch logit caching, reusing baseline predictions for unaffected patches while preserving nnU-Net's fusion scheme. To enable clinically meaningful attributions, we compare three automatically generated feature abstractions within the receptive-field crop: whole-organ units, regular FCC supervoxels, and hybrid organ-aware supervoxels, and we study multiple aggregation/value functions targeting stabilizing evidence (TP/Dice/Soft Dice) or false-positive behavior. Experiments on whole-body CT segmentations show that caching substantially reduces redundant computation (with computational savings ranging from 15% to 30%) and that faithfulness and interpretability exhibit clear trade-offs: regular supervoxels often maximize perturbation-based metrics but lack anatomical alignment, whereas organ-aware units yield more clinically interpretable explanations and are particularly effective for highlighting false-positive drivers under normalized metrics.

</details>


### [280] [HDR Video Generation via Latent Alignment with Logarithmic Encoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11788)
*Naomi Ken Korem,Mohamed Oumoumad,Harel Cain,Matan Ben Yosef,Urska Jelercic,Ofir Bibi,Yaron Inger,Or Patashnik,Daniel Cohen-Or*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种简单的方法，利用预训练生成模型的视觉先验来实现HDR生成，通过对数编码将HDR图像映射到与模型潜在空间对齐的分布，再结合相机模拟退化训练策略，实现高质量HDR视频生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HDR图像提供了丰富的场景辐射表示，但由于与训练生成模型的有界、感知压缩数据不匹配，对生成模型具有挑战性。传统方法需要学习新的HDR表示，增加了复杂性和数据需求。

Method: 使用电影管线中广泛使用的对数编码将HDR图像映射到与预训练生成模型潜在空间对齐的分布，通过轻量级微调直接适配。引入基于相机模拟退化的训练策略，鼓励模型从学习到的先验中推断缺失的高动态范围内容。

Result: 使用预训练视频模型进行最小化适配，实现了高质量的HDR视频生成，在多样化场景和挑战性光照条件下取得了强劲结果。

Conclusion: HDR虽然代表完全不同的图像形成机制，但可以通过选择与生成模型学习先验对齐的表示来有效处理，无需重新设计生成模型。

Abstract: High dynamic range (HDR) imagery offers a rich and faithful representation of scene radiance, but remains challenging for generative models due to its mismatch with the bounded, perceptually compressed data on which these models are trained. A natural solution is to learn new representations for HDR, which introduces additional complexity and data requirements. In this work, we show that HDR generation can be achieved in a much simpler way by leveraging the strong visual priors already captured by pretrained generative models. We observe that a logarithmic encoding widely used in cinematic pipelines maps HDR imagery into a distribution that is naturally aligned with the latent space of these models, enabling direct adaptation via lightweight fine-tuning without retraining an encoder. To recover details that are not directly observable in the input, we further introduce a training strategy based on camera-mimicking degradations that encourages the model to infer missing high dynamic range content from its learned priors. Combining these insights, we demonstrate high-quality HDR video generation using a pretrained video model with minimal adaptation, achieving strong results across diverse scenes and challenging lighting conditions. Our results indicate that HDR, despite representing a fundamentally different image formation regime, can be handled effectively without redesigning generative models, provided that the representation is chosen to align with their learned priors.

</details>


### [281] [LMMs Meet Object-Centric Vision: Understanding, Segmentation, Editing and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11789)
*Yuqian Yuan,Wenqiao Zhang,Juekai Lin,Yu Zhong,Mingjian Gao,Binhe Yu,Yunqi Cao,Wentong Li,Yueting Zhuang,Beng Chin Ooi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统综述了大型多模态模型与物体中心视觉的交叉研究，聚焦于提升物体级理解、分割、编辑和生成的精确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型多模态模型在物体级精确定位、细粒度空间推理和可控视觉操作方面存在局限，需要物体中心视觉的框架来提供明确的视觉实体表示和操作。

Method: 将文献组织为四个主题：物体中心视觉理解、物体中心指代分割、物体中心视觉编辑、物体中心视觉生成，并总结关键建模范式、学习策略和评估协议。

Result: 建立了大型多模态模型与物体中心视觉融合的体系化视角，为开发可扩展、精确和可信赖的物体中心多模态系统提供了结构化框架。

Conclusion: 未来方向包括鲁棒的实例持久性、细粒度空间控制、一致的多步交互、统一跨任务建模以及分布偏移下的可靠基准测试。

Abstract: Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have achieved remarkable progress in general-purpose vision--language understanding, yet they remain limited in tasks requiring precise object-level grounding, fine-grained spatial reasoning, and controllable visual manipulation. In particular, existing systems often struggle to identify the correct instance, preserve object identity across interactions, and localize or modify designated regions with high precision. Object-centric vision provides a principled framework for addressing these challenges by promoting explicit representations and operations over visual entities, thereby extending multimodal systems from global scene understanding to object-level understanding, segmentation, editing, and generation. This paper presents a comprehensive review of recent advances at the convergence of LMMs and object-centric vision. We organize the literature into four major themes: object-centric visual understanding, object-centric referring segmentation, object-centric visual editing, and object-centric visual generation. We further summarize the key modeling paradigms, learning strategies, and evaluation protocols that support these capabilities. Finally, we discuss open challenges and future directions, including robust instance permanence, fine-grained spatial control, consistent multi-step interaction, unified cross-task modeling, and reliable benchmarking under distribution shift. We hope this paper provides a structured perspective on the development of scalable, precise, and trustworthy object-centric multimodal systems.

</details>


### [282] [LottieGPT: Tokenizing Vector Animation for Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11792)
*Junhao Chen,Kejun Gao,Yuehan Cui,Mingze Sun,Mingjin Chen,Shaohui Wang,Xiaoxiao Long,Fei Ma,Qi Tian,Ruqi Huang,Hao Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了首个向量动画生成框架LottieGPT，通过Lottie标记器和自回归模型从文本或视觉提示生成可编辑的矢量动画。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成模型只能生成光栅动画，无法生成具有分辨率独立性、紧凑性、语义结构和可编辑参数运动表示的矢量动画，而矢量动画是互联网上占主导地位且高度表达的多媒体形式。

Method: 1) 采用广泛部署的Lottie动画标准；2) 设计专门的Lottie标记器，将分层几何图元、变换和关键帧运动编码为紧凑的语义对齐标记序列；3) 构建LottieAnimation-660K数据集（66万动画和1500万静态图像）；4) 基于Qwen-VL微调得到LottieGPT多模态模型。

Result: 标记器显著减少序列长度同时保持结构保真度，实现动态矢量内容的有效自回归学习。LottieGPT在多样化动画风格上表现出强泛化能力，在SVG生成（单帧矢量动画特例）上优于先前最先进模型。

Conclusion: 首次实现了原生矢量动画生成框架，能够直接从自然语言或视觉提示生成连贯、可编辑的矢量动画，填补了现有生成模型在矢量动画领域的空白。

Abstract: Despite rapid progress in video generation, existing models are incapable of producing vector animation, a dominant and highly expressive form of multimedia on the Internet. Vector animations offer resolution-independence, compactness, semantic structure, and editable parametric motion representations, yet current generative models operate exclusively in raster space and thus cannot synthesize them. Meanwhile, recent advances in large multimodal models demonstrate strong capabilities in generating structured data such as slides, 3D meshes, LEGO sequences, and indoor layouts, suggesting that native vector animation generation may be achievable. In this work, we present the first framework for tokenizing and autoregressively generating vector animations. We adopt Lottie, a widely deployed JSON-based animation standard, and design a tailored Lottie Tokenizer that encodes layered geometric primitives, transforms, and keyframe-based motion into a compact and semantically aligned token sequence. To support large-scale training, we also construct LottieAnimation-660K, the largest and most diverse vector animation dataset to date, consisting of 660k real-world Lottie animation and 15M static Lottie image files curated from broad Internet sources. Building upon these components, we finetune Qwen-VL to create LottieGPT, a native multimodal model capable of generating coherent, editable vector animations directly from natural language or visual prompts. Experiments show that our tokenizer dramatically reduces sequence length while preserving structural fidelity, enabling effective autoregressive learning of dynamic vector content. LottieGPT exhibits strong generalization across diverse animation styles and outperforms previous state-of-the-art models on SVG generation (a special case of single-frame vector animation).

</details>


### [283] [SyncFix: Fixing 3D Reconstructions via Multi-View Synchronization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11797)
*Deming Li,Abhay Yadav,Cheng Peng,Rama Chellappa,Anand Bhattad*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SyncFix是一个通过跨视图一致性约束来提升扩散模型重建质量的框架，它通过联合潜在桥匹配解决多视图间的语义和几何不一致问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型在重建场景时，不同视图之间往往存在语义和几何不一致，导致重建质量受限。需要一种方法来强制跨视图一致性，提升多视图重建的准确性和保真度。

Method: SyncFix将精炼过程表述为联合潜在桥匹配问题，在多个视图之间同步扭曲和干净的表示。它学习一个多视图的联合条件分布，在整个去噪轨迹中强制一致性。训练仅使用图像对，但推理时可泛化到任意数量的视图。

Result: SyncFix在定性和定量评估中都优于当前最先进的基线方法，即使在没有干净参考图像的情况下也能生成高质量重建。当有稀疏参考图像可用时，重建保真度更高。重建质量随视图数量增加而提升，但高视图数量时收益递减。

Conclusion: SyncFix通过跨视图一致性约束有效解决了扩散模型重建中的不一致问题，显著提升了重建质量，且具有良好的泛化能力，为多视图场景重建提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: We present SyncFix, a framework that enforces cross-view consistency during the diffusion-based refinement of reconstructed scenes. SyncFix formulates refinement as a joint latent bridge matching problem, synchronizing distorted and clean representations across multiple views to fix the semantic and geometric inconsistencies. This means SyncFix learns a joint conditional over multiple views to enforce consistency throughout the denoising trajectory. Our training is done only on image pairs, but it generalizes naturally to an arbitrary number of views during inference. Moreover, reconstruction quality improves with additional views, with diminishing returns at higher view counts. Qualitative and quantitative results demonstrate that SyncFix consistently generates high-quality reconstructions and surpasses current state-of-the-art baselines, even in the absence of clean reference images. SyncFix achieves even higher fidelity when sparse references are available.

</details>


### [284] [Budget-Aware Uncertainty for Radiotherapy Segmentation QA Using nnU-Net](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11798)
*Ricardo Coimbra Brioso,Lorenzo Mondo,Damiano Dei,Nicola Lambri,Pietro Mancosu,Marta Scorsetti,Daniele Loiacono*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于nnU-Net的预算感知不确定性驱动质量保证框架，结合不确定性量化和后验校准，为放疗靶区勾画提供可指导人工审核的体素级不确定性地图


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床靶区勾画对放疗规划至关重要，但耗时且难以评估，特别是对于TMLI等复杂治疗。虽然深度学习自动分割可以减少工作量，但安全临床部署需要可靠的指标来指示模型可能出错的地方

Method: 提出预算感知不确定性驱动的质量保证框架，基于nnU-Net结合不确定性量化和后验校准，生成基于预测熵的体素级不确定性地图。比较了温度缩放、深度集成、检查点集成和测试时增强等方法，单独和组合评估

Result: 分割精度保持稳定，温度缩放显著改善校准效果。经过校准的检查点集成推理能最好地改善不确定性-误差对齐，产生的不确定性地图能更一致地突出需要人工编辑的区域

Conclusion: 将校准与高效集成相结合是实现放疗分割预算感知质量保证工作流程的有前景策略

Abstract: Accurate delineation of the Clinical Target Volume (CTV) is essential for radiotherapy planning, yet remains time-consuming and difficult to assess, especially for complex treatments such as Total Marrow and Lymph Node Irradiation (TMLI). While deep learning-based auto-segmentation can reduce workload, safe clinical deployment requires reliable cues indicating where models may be wrong. In this work, we propose a budget-aware uncertainty-driven quality assurance (QA) framework built on nnU-Net, combining uncertainty quantification and post-hoc calibration to produce voxel-wise uncertainty maps (based on predictive entropy) that can guide targeted manual review. We compare temperature scaling (TS), deep ensembles (DE), checkpoint ensembles (CE), and test-time augmentation (TTA), evaluated both individually and in combination on TMLI as a representative use case. Reliability is assessed through ROI-masked calibration metrics and uncertainty--error alignment under realistic revision constraints, summarized as AUC over the top 0-5% most uncertain voxels. Across configurations, segmentation accuracy remains stable, whereas TS substantially improves calibration. Uncertainty-error alignment improves most with calibrated checkpoint-based inference, leading to uncertainty maps that highlight more consistently regions requiring manual edits. Overall, integrating calibration with efficient ensembling seems a promising strategy to implement a budget-aware QA workflow for radiotherapy segmentation.

</details>


### [285] [OmniShow: Unifying Multimodal Conditions for Human-Object Interaction Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11804)
*Donghao Zhou,Guisheng Liu,Hao Yang,Jiatong Li,Jingyu Lin,Xiaohu Huang,Yichen Liu,Xin Gao,Cunjian Chen,Shilei Wen,Chi-Wing Fu,Pheng-Ann Heng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: OmniShow是一个端到端的人-物交互视频生成框架，能够根据文本、参考图像、音频和姿态等多种条件合成高质量视频，解决了现有方法在多模态条件融合、可控性与质量平衡、数据稀缺等方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人-物交互视频生成在电商演示、短视频制作和互动娱乐等实际应用中具有重要价值，但现有方法无法同时处理文本、图像、音频和姿态等多种条件输入，需要开发能够协调多模态条件并达到工业级性能的解决方案。

Method: 提出OmniShow框架，包含：1）统一通道条件化技术，用于高效注入图像和姿态信息；2）门控局部上下文注意力机制，确保精确的音频-视觉同步；3）解耦-联合训练策略，通过多阶段训练和模型合并有效利用异构子任务数据集。

Result: OmniShow在各种多模态条件设置下实现了整体最先进的性能，建立了HOIVG-Bench基准测试，为人-物交互视频生成任务设定了坚实标准。

Conclusion: OmniShow成功解决了人-物交互视频生成中的多模态条件协调问题，在可控性和质量之间取得了良好平衡，为实际应用提供了工业级性能的解决方案。

Abstract: In this work, we study Human-Object Interaction Video Generation (HOIVG), which aims to synthesize high-quality human-object interaction videos conditioned on text, reference images, audio, and pose. This task holds significant practical value for automating content creation in real-world applications, such as e-commerce demonstrations, short video production, and interactive entertainment. However, existing approaches fail to accommodate all these requisite conditions. We present OmniShow, an end-to-end framework tailored for this practical yet challenging task, capable of harmonizing multimodal conditions and delivering industry-grade performance. To overcome the trade-off between controllability and quality, we introduce Unified Channel-wise Conditioning for efficient image and pose injection, and Gated Local-Context Attention to ensure precise audio-visual synchronization. To effectively address data scarcity, we develop a Decoupled-Then-Joint Training strategy that leverages a multi-stage training process with model merging to efficiently harness heterogeneous sub-task datasets. Furthermore, to fill the evaluation gap in this field, we establish HOIVG-Bench, a dedicated and comprehensive benchmark for HOIVG. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OmniShow achieves overall state-of-the-art performance across various multimodal conditioning settings, setting a solid standard for the emerging HOIVG task.

</details>


### [286] [Pair2Scene: Learning Local Object Relations for Procedural Scene Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11808)
*Xingjian Ran,Shujie Zhang,Weipeng Zhong,Li Luo,Bo Dai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Pair2Scene：基于局部规则和层次结构的3D室内场景生成框架，通过学习物体间的支撑和功能关系，实现超越训练数据分布的高保真复杂场景生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前3D室内场景生成方法面临数据稀缺和复杂空间关系建模的挑战，现有方法难以扩展到密集场景或缺乏精确的空间推理能力。作者观察到物体放置主要依赖局部依赖关系而非信息冗余的全局分布。

Method: 提出Pair2Scene框架，整合学习的局部规则、场景层次结构和物理算法。通过神经网络建模物体间的支撑关系（物理层次）和功能关系（语义链接），在3D-Pairs数据集上训练模型。推理时通过层次结构递归应用模型，结合碰撞感知拒绝采样来整合局部规则形成全局布局。

Result: 实验表明该框架在生成超越训练数据的复杂环境方面优于现有方法，同时保持物理和语义合理性。

Conclusion: Pair2Scene通过局部依赖关系建模和层次化生成策略，有效解决了3D室内场景生成的挑战，能够生成高质量、物理合理且语义连贯的复杂场景。

Abstract: Generating high-fidelity 3D indoor scenes remains a significant challenge due to data scarcity and the complexity of modeling intricate spatial relations. Current methods often struggle to scale beyond training distribution to dense scenes or rely on LLMs/VLMs that lack the ability for precise spatial reasoning. Building on top of the observation that object placement relies mainly on local dependencies instead of information-redundant global distributions, in this paper, we propose Pair2Scene, a novel procedural generation framework that integrates learned local rules with scene hierarchies and physics-based algorithms. These rules mainly capture two types of inter-object relations, namely support relations that follow physical hierarchies, and functional relations that reflect semantic links. We model these rules through a network, which estimates spatial position distributions of dependent objects conditioned on position and geometry of the anchor ones. Accordingly, we curate a dataset 3D-Pairs from existing scene data to train the model. During inference, our framework can generate scenes by recursively applying our model within a hierarchical structure, leveraging collision-aware rejection sampling to align local rules into coherent global layouts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our framework outperforms existing methods in generating complex environments that go beyond training data while maintaining physical and semantic plausibility.

</details>


### [287] [Who Handles Orientation? Investigating Invariance in Feature Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11809)
*David Nordström,Johan Edstedt,Fredrik Kahl,Georg Bökman*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 研究图像匹配中平面旋转鲁棒性的问题，发现描述子层面的旋转不变性训练与匹配器层面的处理效果相当，但前者能实现更快的旋转不变匹配，且大规模训练不会损害正常姿态的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代图像匹配器在处理大平面旋转时表现不佳，虽然可以通过数据增强学习旋转不变性，但旋转不变性应该在哪个阶段（描述子或匹配器）引入尚不明确。

Method: 在现代稀疏匹配流程框架下进行实验，在大量3D视觉数据集上训练，并在流行图像匹配基准上评估，研究旋转不变性在不同阶段引入的效果。

Result: 1) 在描述子层面引入旋转不变性与在匹配器层面处理效果相似；2) 描述子层面的旋转不变性实现更早，可实现更快的旋转不变匹配；3) 大规模训练下，强制旋转不变性不会损害正常姿态性能；4) 增加训练数据规模能显著提升对旋转图像的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过大规模训练，可以在描述子层面有效实现旋转不变性，不会损害正常匹配性能，且能实现更快的旋转不变匹配。研究发布了两个在平面旋转鲁棒性方面达到SOTA的匹配器。

Abstract: Finding matching keypoints between images is a core problem in 3D computer vision. However, modern matchers struggle with large in-plane rotations. A straightforward mitigation is to learn rotation invariance via data augmentation. However, it remains unclear at which stage rotation invariance should be incorporated. In this paper, we study this in the context of a modern sparse matching pipeline. We perform extensive experiments by training on a large collection of 3D vision datasets and evaluating on popular image matching benchmarks. Surprisingly, we find that incorporating rotation invariance already in the descriptor yields similar performance to handling it in the matcher. However, rotation invariance is achieved earlier in the matcher when it is learned in the descriptor, allowing for a faster rotation-invariant matcher. Further, we find that enforcing rotation invariance does not hurt upright performance when trained at scale. Finally, we study the emergence of rotation invariance through scale and find that increasing the training data size substantially improves generalization to rotated images. We release two matchers robust to in-plane rotations that achieve state-of-the-art performance on e.g. multi-modal (WxBS), extreme (HardMatch), and satellite image matching (SatAst). Code is available at https://github.com/davnords/loma.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [288] [Spectral Kernel Dynamics via Maximum Caliber: Fixed Points, Geodesics, and Phase Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09745)
*Jnaneshwar Das*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于最大口径原理的核动力学闭式几何泛函，用于有限图上的核演化分析，推导出解耦的一维问题并获得自洽核、测地线等结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究有限图上核动力学的数学框架，通过最大口径变分原理在谱域建立几何泛函，为网络结构相变提供计算可行的早期预警信号。

Method: 应用最大口径变分原理于图拉普拉斯特征基的谱传递函数h(λ)，推导出闭式几何泛函，将MaxCal平稳条件解耦为N个一维问题，获得指数倾斜、对数线性Fisher-Rao测地线等显式解。

Result: 获得自洽核（固定点核）、测地线解析表达式、对角Hessian稳定性判据、谱核空间l^2_+等距等理论结果；谱熵H[h_t]提供O(N)复杂度的网络结构相变早期预警信号；在路径图P_8上数值验证所有结论。

Conclusion: 建立了有限图上核动力学的统一几何框架，基于爱因斯坦场方程的结构类比（非等价关系）指导理论发展，为网络结构相变监测提供有效计算工具。

Abstract: We derive a closed-form geometric functional for kernel dynamics on finite graphs by applying the Maximum Caliber (MaxCal) variational principle to the spectral transfer function h(lambda) of the graph Laplacian eigenbasis. The main result is that the MaxCal stationarity condition decouples into N one-dimensional problems with explicit solution: h*(lambda_l) = h_0(lambda_l) exp(-1 - T_l[h*]), yielding self-consistent (fixed-point) kernels via exponential tilting (Corollary 1), log-linear Fisher-Rao geodesics (Corollary 2), a diagonal Hessian stability criterion (Corollary 3), and an l^2_+ isometry for the spectral kernel space (Proposition 3). The spectral entropy H[h_t] provides a computable O(N) early-warning signal for network-structural phase transitions (Remark 7). All claims are numerically verified on the path graph P_8 with a Gaussian mutual-information source, using the open-source kernelcal library. The framework is grounded in a structural analogy with Einstein's field equations, used as a guiding template rather than an established equivalence; explicit limits are stated in Section 6.

</details>


### [289] [Kinematics of continuum planar grasping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09800)
*Udit Halder,Nicolas Echeverria Zambrano,Xincheng Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种分析框架，用于研究软连续体手臂抓取平面物体时的几何形状。通过将手臂中心线和物体边界建模为光滑曲线，将抓取问题表述为运动学边界跟随问题，并使用最优控制方法求解最优抓取构型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究软连续体手臂抓取平面物体时的几何形状问题，为软体机器人抓取提供理论分析框架，解决传统刚性机器人难以处理的柔性抓取问题。

Method: 将手臂中心线和物体边界建模为光滑曲线，将抓取问题表述为运动学边界跟随问题，建立基于相对几何形状变量的简化运动学方程，使用庞特里亚金极大值原理求解最优控制问题，提出基于连续体抓取映射代数特性的抓取质量度量。

Result: 建立了软连续体手臂抓取平面物体的几何分析框架，得到了最优抓取构型的求解方法，提出了连续体抓取质量度量标准，并通过系统数值仿真验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究为软连续体手臂抓取提供了系统的几何分析和优化框架，所提出的方法能够有效确定最优抓取构型和评估抓取质量，为软体机器人抓取控制奠定了理论基础。

Abstract: This paper presents an analytical framework to study the geometry arising when a soft continuum arm grasps a planar object. Both the arm centerline and the object boundary are modeled as smooth curves. The grasping problem is formulated as a kinematic boundary following problem, in which the object boundary acts as the arm's 'shadow curve'. This formulation leads to a set of reduced kinematic equations expressed in terms of relative geometric shape variables, with the arm curvature serving as the control input. An optimal control problem is formulated to determine feasible arm shapes that achieve optimal grasping configurations, and its solution is obtained using Pontryagin's Maximum Principle. Based on the resulting optimal grasp kinematics, a class of continuum grasp quality metrics is proposed using the algebraic properties of the associated continuum grasp map. Feedback control aspects in the dynamic setting are also discussed. The proposed methodology is illustrated through systematic numerical simulations.

</details>


### [290] [ProGAL-VLA: Grounded Alignment through Prospective Reasoning in Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09824)
*Nastaran Darabi,Amit Ranjan Trivedi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出ProGAL-VLA模型解决VLA模型的语言忽视问题，通过构建3D实体图、慢速规划器生成符号子目标，以及使用接地对齐对比损失来提升对指令变化的敏感性和处理模糊性的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型存在语言忽视问题，过度依赖视觉捷径，对指令变化不敏感，需要提升模型对语言指令的理解和响应能力。

Method: 构建3D实体中心图(GSM)，使用慢速规划器生成符号子目标，通过接地对齐对比损失(GAC)将子目标与接地实体对齐，所有动作都基于经过验证的目标嵌入$g_t$，其注意力熵提供内在模糊性信号。

Result: 在LIBERO-Plus上，ProGAL-VLA将机器人扰动下的鲁棒性从30.3%提升到71.5%，语言忽视减少3-4倍，实体检索Recall@1从0.41提升到0.71。在自定义模糊性基准测试中，AUROC达到0.81(对比0.52)，AUPR 0.79，模糊输入下的澄清请求从0.09提升到0.81，且不影响明确任务的成功率。

Conclusion: 显式的验证接地是构建对指令敏感、能感知模糊性的智能体有效路径，验证瓶颈增加了语言-动作的互信息，GAC损失施加了实体级InfoNCE约束，注意力熵提供了校准的选择性预测。

Abstract: Vision language action (VLA) models enable generalist robotic agents but often exhibit language ignorance, relying on visual shortcuts and remaining insensitive to instruction changes. We present Prospective Grounding and Alignment VLA (ProGAL-VLA), which constructs a 3D entity-centric graph (GSM), uses a slow planner to produce symbolic sub-goals, and aligns them with grounded entities via a Grounding Alignment Contrastive (GAC) loss. All actions are conditioned on a verified goal embedding $g_t$, whose attention entropy provides an intrinsic ambiguity signal. On LIBERO-Plus, ProGAL-VLA increases robustness under robot perturbations from 30.3 to 71.5 percent, reduces language ignorance by 3x-4x, and improves entity retrieval from 0.41 to 0.71 Recall@1. On the Custom Ambiguity Benchmark, it reaches AUROC 0.81 (vs. 0.52), AUPR 0.79, and raises clarification on ambiguous inputs from 0.09 to 0.81 without harming unambiguous success. The verification bottleneck increases mutual information of language-actions, the GAC loss imposes an entity-level InfoNCE bound, and attention entropy yields calibrated selective prediction, indicating that explicit verified grounding is an effective path toward instruction-sensitive, ambiguity-aware agents.

</details>


### [291] [Perception Is All You Need: A Neuroscience Framework for Low Cost Sensorless Gaze in HRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09829)
*Mason Kadem*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一种基于人类视觉系统凸性假设的无传感器、无计算、低成本机器人设计框架，通过凹形眼窝和绘制瞳孔实现感知注视跟随，将人类感知系统作为机器人的"执行器"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器人注视跟随技术成本高昂（3万美元以上），需要复杂传感器和算法，且存在隐私问题。需要一种低成本、无传感器、无隐私顾虑的解决方案，使注视跟随技术能够大规模应用。

Method: 利用人类视觉系统的凸性先验，设计凹形眼窝和绘制瞳孔的纸板机器人。基于神经科学证据：分布式面部处理网络、高精度凸性先验、预测处理层次结构。通过反向实现大脑注视计算流程，让观看者的感知系统成为机器人的"执行器"。

Result: 开发出成本低于1美元的开源模板机器人，具有参数化可互换眼插片。建立了设计约束和边界条件（发展性、临床性和几何性），预测了框架的成功和失败场景。使二十年的人机交互注视研究成果能够大规模应用。

Conclusion: 通过利用人类视觉系统的固有机制，实现了无传感器、无电源、无隐私问题的低成本注视跟随机器人设计，为人机交互注视研究的大规模应用提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Gaze-following in child-robot interaction improves attention, recall, and learning, but requires expensive platforms (\$30,000+), sensors, algorithms, and raises privacy concerns. We propose a framework that avoids sensors and computation entirely, instead relying on the human visual system's assumption of convexity to produce perceptual gaze-following between a robot and its viewer. Specifically, we motivate sub-dollar cardboard robot design that directly implements the brain's own gaze computation pipeline in reverse, making the viewer's perceptual system the robot's "actuator", with no sensors, no power, and no privacy concerns. We ground this framework in three converging lines of theoretical and empirical neuroscience evidence. Namely, the distributed face processing network that computes gaze direction via the superior temporal sulcus, the high-precision convexity prior that causes the brain to perceive concave faces as convex, and the predictive processing hierarchy in which top-down face knowledge overrides bottom-up depth signals. These mechanisms explain why a concave eye socket with a painted pupil produces the perception of mutual gaze from any viewing angle. We derive design constraints from perceptual science, present a sub-dollar open-template robot with parameterized interchangeable eye inserts, and identify boundary conditions (developmental, clinical, and geometric) that predict where the framework will succeed and where it will fail. If leveraged, two decades of HRI gaze findings become deliverable at population scale.

</details>


### [292] [RoboLab: A High-Fidelity Simulation Benchmark for Analysis of Task Generalist Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09860)
*Xuning Yang,Rishit Dagli,Alex Zook,Hugo Hadfield,Ankit Goyal,Stan Birchfield,Fabio Ramos,Jonathan Tremblay*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboLab是一个机器人仿真基准测试框架，包含RoboLab-120基准测试集，通过人类和LLM生成场景任务，评估任务通用型机器人策略的真实泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真基准测试存在训练和评估领域重叠严重、性能快速饱和、缺乏真实泛化测试的问题，导致成功率被高估且难以评估鲁棒性。

Method: 1. 构建RoboLab框架，支持人类和LLM在物理逼真和视觉逼真的仿真中生成机器人无关、策略无关的场景和任务；2. 提出RoboLab-120基准测试，包含120个任务，按视觉、程序、关系三个能力轴和三个难度级别分类；3. 引入对现实世界策略的系统分析，量化其性能及对受控扰动的敏感性。

Result: 评估显示当前最先进模型存在显著性能差距；高保真仿真可作为分析性能及其对外部因素依赖性的代理；RoboLab提供了评估任务通用型机器人策略真实泛化能力的可扩展框架。

Conclusion: RoboLab通过细粒度指标和可扩展工具集，为评估任务通用型机器人策略的真实泛化能力提供了一个系统性框架，揭示了当前模型的局限性并提供了分析工具。

Abstract: The pursuit of general-purpose robotics has yielded impressive foundation models, yet simulation-based benchmarking remains a bottleneck due to rapid performance saturation and a lack of true generalization testing. Existing benchmarks often exhibit significant domain overlap between training and evaluation, trivializing success rates and obscuring insights into robustness. We introduce RoboLab, a simulation benchmarking framework designed to address these challenges. Concretely, our framework is designed to answer two questions: (1) to what extent can we understand the performance of a real-world policy by analyzing its behavior in simulation, and (2) which external factors most strongly affect that behavior under controlled perturbations. First, RoboLab enables human-authored and LLM-enabled generation of scenes and tasks in a robot- and policy-agnostic manner within a physically realistic and photorealistic simulation. With this, we propose the RoboLab-120 benchmark, consisting of 120 tasks categorized into three competency axes: visual, procedural, relational competency, across three difficulty levels. Second, we introduce a systematic analysis of real-world policies that quantify both their performance and the sensitivity of their behavior to controlled perturbations, indicating that high-fidelity simulation can serve as a proxy for analyzing performance and its dependence on external factors. Evaluation with RoboLab exposes significant performance gap in current state-of-the-art models. By providing granular metrics and a scalable toolset, RoboLab offers a scalable framework for evaluating the true generalization capabilities of task-generalist robotic policies.

</details>


### [293] [CableTract: A Co-Designed Cable-Driven Field Robot for Low-Compaction, Off-Grid Capable Agriculture](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09938)
*Ozgur Yilmaz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个综合框架来分析新型农业车辆CableTract，该框架整合了机械、能源、耕作阻力、田间几何、经济性、生命周期CO2和不确定性量化等多个方面，并通过开源代码实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统田间作业大部分能量用于移动拖拉机本身而非农具，而现有可行性研究很少将机械、能源收获、耕作阻力、田间几何、经济性、生命周期CO2和不确定性量化整合到一个可复现的代码路径中。

Method: 构建了一个原型无关的框架，包含悬链线电缆模型、传动效率链、基于协同设计农具库的随机耕作阻力模型、六地点的太阳能+风能+电池模拟器、50个田块的多边形覆盖规划器、接触压力压实模型、考虑电池更换和生命周期CO2的贴现现金流经济引擎，以及20个输入的全局敏感性分析。

Result: 应用于协同设计的CableTract参考系统，该框架显示出能源优势、压实优势以及潜在的离网运行能力。

Conclusion: 该论文成功开发了一个综合框架来分析新型农业车辆，通过协同设计方法展示了CableTract在能源效率和减少土壤压实方面的潜力，并提供了完整的开源实现供进一步研究。

Abstract: Conventional field operations spend most of their energy moving the tractor body, not the implement. Yet feasibility studies for novel agricultural vehicles rarely tie mechanics, energy harvest, draft, field geometry, economics, life-cycle CO2, and uncertainty quantification together on a single reproducible code path. This paper builds such a framework and applies it to CableTract, a two-module cable-driven field robot. A stationary Main Unit (winch + motor + battery + harvester module) (MU) and a lighter Anchor module (held by helical screw piles) tension a cable across a strip while a lightweight implement carriage rolls along it. The heavy bodies stay on the headland; only the carriage enters the field. The carriage runs a 10-implement library co-designed for the cable architecture. This co-design is the paper's central analytical lever. The framework is prototype-free. It chains a catenary cable model, a drivetrain efficiency chain, a stochastic draft model fitted to the co-designed library, an hourly solar + wind + battery simulator on six sites, a polygon coverage planner on a 50-field corpus, a contact-pressure compaction model, a discounted cash-flow economics engine with battery replacement and life-cycle CO2, and a global sensitivity analysis on 20 inputs. An operating-envelope sweep and an architectural-variant comparison close the loop. The full implementation is open source. Applied to the codesigned reference, the framework yields energy, compaction advantages and potential off-grid operation.

</details>


### [294] [GPU-Accelerated Continuous-Time Successive Convexification for Contact-Implicit Legged Locomotion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09993)
*Samuel C. Buckner,Purnanand Elango*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于连续时间逐次凸化的接触隐式轨迹优化方法ci-SCvx，通过积分交叉互补约束避免了接触事件遗漏，实现了多体动力学建模和快速求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有接触隐式轨迹优化方法依赖精细时间离散化来准确捕捉接触事件，这会增加问题规模和计算时间，且解的质量受网格分辨率限制。需要一种能在粗时间网格下仍能准确处理接触事件的方法。

Method: 扩展连续时间逐次凸化方法到接触隐式轨迹优化，引入积分交叉互补约束来避免离散节点间接触事件遗漏，支持接触模式变化。采用回溯同伦方案处理互补约束，在Python中实现并利用JAX进行GPU加速。

Result: ci-SCvx能够在多种足式运动任务中生成物理一致的轨迹，与MuJoCo MPC基线相比能耗更低。软件求解速度比现有最先进的SCP实现快一个数量级以上。

Conclusion: 提出的ci-SCvx框架解决了接触隐式轨迹优化中接触事件遗漏问题，实现了快速高效的求解，为可扩展的实时轨迹优化做出了重要贡献。

Abstract: Contact-implicit trajectory optimization (CITO) enables the automatic discovery of contact sequences, but most methods rely on fine time discretization to capture all contact events accurately, which increases problem size and runtime while tying solution quality to grid resolution. We extend the recently proposed sequential convex programming (SCP) approach for trajectory optimization, continuous-time successive convexification (ct-SCvx), to CITO by introducing integral cross-complementarity constraints, which eliminate the risk of missing contact events between discretization nodes while preserving the flexibility of contact mode changes. The resulting framework, contact-implicit successive convexification (ci-SCvx), models full multibody dynamics in maximal coordinates, including stick-slip friction and partially elastic impacts. To handle complementarity constraints, we embed a backtracking homotopy scheme within SCP for reliable convergence. We implement this framework in a stand-alone Python software, leveraging JAX for GPU acceleration and a custom canonical-form parser for the convex subproblems of SCP to avoid the overhead of general-purpose modeling tools such as CVXPY. We demonstrate ci-SCvx on diverse legged-locomotion tasks. In particular, we validate the approach in MuJoCo with the Gymnasium HalfCheetah model against the MuJoCo MPC baseline, showing that a tracking simulation with the optimized torque profiles from ci-SCvx produces physically consistent trajectories with lesser energy consumption. We also show that the resulting software achieves faster solve times than existing state-of-the-art SCP implementations by over an order of magnitude, thereby demonstrating a practically important contribution to scalable real-time trajectory optimization.

</details>


### [295] [Vision-Language-Action Model, Robustness, Multi-modal Learning, Robot Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10055)
*Yuhan Xie,Yuping Yan,Yunqi Zhao,Handing Wang,Yaochu Jin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: STRONG-VLA提出一种解耦微调框架，通过分阶段训练提升视觉-语言-动作模型的多模态鲁棒性，在保持任务执行精度的同时增强对视觉和语言扰动的抵抗能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在多模态扰动（视觉损坏+语言噪声）下表现脆弱，传统鲁棒性方法通常采用联合训练，导致鲁棒性与任务保真度之间的优化冲突。

Method: 提出两阶段解耦微调框架：第一阶段通过难度递增的多模态扰动课程学习渐进鲁棒性；第二阶段与干净任务分布重新对齐以恢复执行保真度。建立了包含28种扰动类型的综合基准。

Result: 在LIBERO基准测试中，STRONG-VLA显著提升多种VLA架构的任务成功率：OpenVLA在可见扰动下提升12.60%，未见扰动下提升7.77%；OpenVLA-OFT提升14.48%/13.81%；pi0提升16.49%/5.58%。真实世界机器人实验验证了实用性。

Conclusion: 解耦优化对多模态鲁棒性至关重要，STRONG-VLA作为一个简单而原则性的框架，能够有效提升具身控制系统的鲁棒性，并具有良好的跨架构泛化能力。

Abstract: Despite their strong performance in embodied tasks, recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain highly fragile under multimodal perturbations, where visual corruption and linguistic noise jointly induce distribution shifts that degrade task-level execution. Existing robustness approaches typically rely on joint training with perturbed data, treating robustness as a static objective, which leads to conflicting optimization between robustness and task fidelity. In this work, we propose STRONG-VLA, a decoupled fine-tuning framework that explicitly separates robustness acquisition from task-aligned refinement. In Stage I, the model is exposed to a curriculum of multimodal perturbations with increasing difficulty, enabling progressive robustness learning under controlled distribution shifts. In Stage II, the model is re-aligned with clean task distributions to recover execution fidelity while preserving robustness. We further establish a comprehensive benchmark with 28 perturbation types spanning both textual and visual modalities, grounded in realistic sources of sensor noise, occlusion, and instruction corruption. Extensive experiments on the LIBERO benchmark show that STRONG-VLA consistently improves task success rates across multiple VLA architectures. On OpenVLA, our method achieves gains of up to 12.60% under seen perturbations and 7.77% under unseen perturbations. Notably, similar or larger improvements are observed on OpenVLA-OFT (+14.48% / +13.81%) and pi0 (+16.49% / +5.58%), demonstrating strong cross-architecture generalization. Real-world experiments on an AIRBOT robotic platform further validate its practical effectiveness. These results highlight the importance of decoupled optimization for multimodal robustness and establish STRONG-VLA as a simple yet principled framework for robust embodied control.

</details>


### [296] [Natural Gradient Gaussian Approximation Filter on Lie Groups for Robot State Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10057)
*Tianyi Zhang,Wenhan Cao,Chang Liu,Yao Lyu,Shengbo Eben Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了NANO-L滤波器，一种在李群上进行自然梯度高斯近的新型滤波器，通过参数优化避免线性化，显著降低了状态估计误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决李群流形上机器人系统状态估计的挑战，特别是在非线性观测模型和曲率流形上，现有滤波器依赖切空间线性化导致误差累积的问题。

Method: 将流形滤波重新表述为高斯分布增量变量的参数优化问题，避免线性化；提出自然梯度优化方案，利用增量变量的Fisher信息矩阵考虑切空间曲率；针对不变观测模型，推导出协方差更新的精确闭式解。

Result: 在Unitree GO2腿式机器人不同地形实验中，NANO-L比常用滤波器降低了约40%的估计误差，且计算成本相当。

Conclusion: NANO-L滤波器通过避免线性化和利用自然梯度优化，显著提高了李群流形上机器人状态估计的精度，为敏捷控制提供了更可靠的状态估计。

Abstract: Accurate state estimation for robotic systems evolving on Lie group manifolds, such as legged robots, is a prerequisite for achieving agile control. However, this task is challenged by nonlinear observation models defined on curved manifolds, where existing filters rely on local linearization in the tangent space to handle such nonlinearity, leading to accumulated estimation errors.
