Result: 在多达15个智能体的KITTI序列上，Sim(3)公式相比SE(3)基线实现了7.2倍的ATE（绝对轨迹误差）降低，警报机制拒绝了所有误报回环检测同时保留了每个有效约束。系统还演示了在单一统一地图中融合MASt3R-SLAM、pi3和VGGT-SLAM 2.0的异构多机器人密集建图。

Conclusion: MR.ScaleMaster成功解决了众包单目协作建图中的尺度崩溃和尺度漂移问题，通过创新的尺度管理机制实现了更稳定、更准确的3D重建，并为异构SLAM系统的集成提供了实用框架。

Abstract: Crowd-sourced cooperative mapping from monocular cameras promises scalable 3D reconstruction without specialized sensors, yet remains hindered by two scale-specific failure modes: abrupt scale collapse from false-positive loop closures in repetitive environments, and gradual scale drift over long trajectories and per-robot scale ambiguity that prevent direct multi-session fusion. We present MR.ScaleMaster, a cooperative mapping system for crowd-sourced monocular videos that addresses both failure modes. MR.ScaleMaster introduces three key mechanisms. First, a Scale Collapse Alarm rejects spurious loop closures before they corrupt the pose graph. Second, a Sim(3) anchor node formulation generalizes the classical SE(3) framework to explicitly estimate per-session scale, resolving per-robot scale ambiguity and enforcing global scale consistency. Third, a modular, open-source, plug-and-play interface enables any monocular reconstruction model to integrate without backend modification. On KITTI sequences with up to 15 agents, the Sim(3) formulation achieves a 7.2x ATE reduction over the SE(3) baseline, and the alarm rejects all false-positive loops while preserving every valid constraint. We further demonstrate heterogeneous multi-robot dense mapping fusing MASt3R-SLAM, pi3, and VGGT-SLAM 2.0 within a single unified map.

</details>


### [335] [Minimal Embodiment Enables Efficient Learning of Number Concepts in Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11373)
*Zhegong Shangguan,Alessandro Di Nuovo,Angelo Cangelosi*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究通过机器人交互训练神经网络进行顺序计数，发现具身模型比纯视觉模型更高效（仅需10%训练数据达到96.8%准确率），且能自发产生类似生物认知的数值表征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索智能系统如何从感觉运动经验中获取抽象数值概念，解决认知科学和人工智能中的基础挑战，研究具身学习在数值概念获取中的作用。

Method: 使用神经网络模型，通过Franka Panda机械臂的自然交互进行顺序计数训练，比较具身模型与纯视觉基线的性能，并随机化视觉-运动对应关系以分析具身作用机制。

Result: 具身模型仅需10%训练数据即达到96.8%计数准确率，显著优于纯视觉基线的60.6%。即使随机化视觉-运动对应关系，优势仍保持，表明具身作为结构化先验而非信息源。模型自发产生对数调谐的数字选择性单元、心理数字线组织、韦伯定律缩放和编码数值大小的旋转动力学（r=0.97，斜率=30.6°/计数）。学习轨迹与儿童从子集知识者到基数原则知识者的发展进程相似。

Conclusion: 最小化的具身能有效锚定抽象概念、提高数据效率，并产生与生物认知一致的可解释表征，为具身数学辅导和安全关键的工业应用提供了新途径。

Abstract: Robots are increasingly entering human-interactive scenarios that require understanding of quantity. How intelligent systems acquire abstract numerical concepts from sensorimotor experience remains a fundamental challenge in cognitive science and artificial intelligence. Here we investigate embodied numerical learning using a neural network model trained to perform sequential counting through naturalistic robotic interaction with a Franka Panda manipulator. We demonstrate that embodied models achieve 96.8\% counting accuracy with only 10\% of training data, compared to 60.6\% for vision-only baselines. This advantage persists when visual-motor correspondences are randomized, indicating that embodiment functions as a structural prior that regularizes learning rather than as an information source. The model spontaneously develops biologically plausible representations: number-selective units with logarithmic tuning, mental number line organization, Weber-law scaling, and rotational dynamics encoding numerical magnitude ($r = 0.97$, slope $= 30.6°$/count). The learning trajectory parallels children's developmental progression from subset-knowers to cardinal-principle knowers. These findings demonstrate that minimal embodiment can ground abstract concepts, improve data efficiency, and yield interpretable representations aligned with biological cognition, which may contribute to embodied mathematics tutoring and safety-critical industrial applications.

</details>


### [336] [EagleVision: A Multi-Task Benchmark for Cross-Domain Perception in High-Speed Autonomous Racing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11400)
*Zakhar Yagudin,Murad Mebrahtu,Ren Jin,Jiaqi Huang,Yujia Yue,Dzmitry Tsetserukou,Jorge Dias,Majid Khonji*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EagleVision是首个针对高速赛车场景的LiDAR多任务基准，包含真实和模拟数据集，用于系统研究高速动态下的感知泛化能力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高速自动驾驶赛车面临极端感知挑战，包括大相对速度和与常规城市驾驶数据集的显著域偏移，现有基准无法充分捕捉这些高动态条件

Method: 创建统一的LiDAR多任务基准，包含新标注的Indy Autonomous Challenge数据集(14,893帧)、A2RL Real竞赛数据集(1,163帧)和12,000帧模拟生成数据，采用基于数据集的迁移框架量化跨域泛化

Result: 城市预训练提升检测性能(NDS 0.72 vs 0.69)，真实赛车数据预训练在A2RL上表现最佳(NDS 0.726)；轨迹预测中Indy训练模型在A2RL测试序列上优于域内训练(FDE 0.947 vs 1.250)

Conclusion: EagleVision基准支持系统研究高速动态下的感知泛化，揭示了运动分布覆盖在跨域预测中的关键作用，数据集和基准已公开

Abstract: High-speed autonomous racing presents extreme perception challenges, including large relative velocities and substantial domain shifts from conventional urban-driving datasets. Existing benchmarks do not adequately capture these high-dynamic conditions. We introduce EagleVision, a unified LiDAR-based multi-task benchmark for 3D detection and trajectory prediction in high-speed racing, providing newly annotated 3D bounding boxes for the Indy Autonomous Challenge dataset (14,893 frames) and the A2RL Real competition dataset (1,163 frames), together with 12,000 simulator-generated annotated frames, all standardized under a common evaluation protocol. Using a dataset-centric transfer framework, we quantify cross-domain generalization across urban, simulator, and real racing domains. Urban pretraining improves detection over scratch training (NDS 0.72 vs. 0.69), while intermediate pretraining on real racing data achieves the best transfer to A2RL (NDS 0.726), outperforming simulator-only adaptation. For trajectory prediction, Indy-trained models surpass in-domain A2RL training on A2RL test sequences (FDE 0.947 vs. 1.250), highlighting the role of motion-distribution coverage in cross-domain forecasting. EagleVision enables systematic study of perception generalization under extreme high-speed dynamics. The dataset and benchmark are publicly available at https://avlab.io/EagleVision

</details>


### [337] [Using Unwrapped Full Color Space Palette Recording to Measure Exposedness of a Vehicle Exterior Parts for External Human Machine Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11406)
*Jaerock Kwon,Jose Gonzalez-Belmonte*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 通过模拟分析车辆外部可见性，为自动驾驶车外部人机界面(eHMI)提供最优安装位置建议


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶车辆需要向行人等道路使用者传达意图以防止事故，外部人机界面(eHMI)是解决方案，但需要确定最佳安装位置以确保可见性

Method: 使用网格展开技术将车辆表面映射到纹理上，在Unity游戏引擎中创建并运行动态模拟，测量2015款福特F-150 King Ranch在四向交叉路口处各点对行人的可见频率

Result: 保险杠、格栅和引擎盖是对行人最常可见的部位，但同车道其他车辆可能遮挡这些区域，因此单独使用这些位置不足够

Conclusion: 建议采用分布式eHMI方法，同时使用挡风玻璃和前翼子板作为安装位置，以提高可见性和可靠性

Abstract: One of the concerns with autonomous vehicles is their ability to communicate their intent to other road users, specially pedestrians, in order to prevent accidents. External Human-Machine Interfaces (eHMIs) are the proposed solution to this issue, through the introduction of electronic devices on the exterior of a vehicle that communicate when the vehicle is planning on slowing down or yielding. This paper uses the technique of unwrapping the faces of a mesh onto a texture where every pixel is a unique color, as well as a series of animated simulations made and ran in the Unity game engine, to measure how many times is each point on a 2015 Ford F-150 King Ranch is unobstructed to a pedestrian attempting to cross the road at a four-way intersection. By cross-referencing the results with a color-coded map of the labeled parts on the exterior of the vehicle, it was concluded that while the bumper, grill, and hood were the parts of the vehicle visible to the crossing pedestrian most often, the existence of other vehicles on the same lane that might obstruct the view of these makes them insufficient. The study recommends instead a distributive approach to eHMIs by using both the windshield and frontal fenders as simultaneous placements for these devices.

</details>


### [338] [Efficient Emotion-Aware Iconic Gesture Prediction for Robot Co-Speech](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11417)
*Edwin C. Montiel-Vazquez,Christian Arzate Cruz,Stefanos Gkikas,Thomas Kassiotis,Giorgos Giannakakis,Randy Gomez*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出轻量级Transformer模型，仅从文本和情感生成语义强调手势，无需音频输入，在BEAT2数据集上超越GPT-4o，适合实时部署


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据驱动的机器人系统大多生成节奏性节拍手势，但缺乏语义强调。为了在无需音频输入的情况下实现语义手势生成，需要开发能够从文本和情感中提取语义信息的手势生成模型。

Method: 提出轻量级Transformer模型，仅使用文本和情感作为输入（推理时无需音频），学习生成具有语义强调的手势放置位置和强度。模型在BEAT2数据集上进行训练和评估。

Result: 在BEAT2数据集上，该模型在语义手势放置分类和强度回归任务上均优于GPT-4o，同时保持计算紧凑性，适合在具身智能体上实时部署。

Conclusion: 仅从文本和情感信息就能有效生成语义强调手势，无需音频输入。该轻量级Transformer模型在性能上超越大型语言模型，同时满足实时部署需求，为机器人手势生成提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Co-speech gestures increase engagement and improve speech understanding. Most data-driven robot systems generate rhythmic beat-like motion, yet few integrate semantic emphasis. To address this, we propose a lightweight transformer that derives iconic gesture placement and intensity from text and emotion alone, requiring no audio input at inference time. The model outperforms GPT-4o in both semantic gesture placement classification and intensity regression on the BEAT2 dataset, while remaining computationally compact and suitable for real-time deployment on embodied agents.

</details>


### [339] [Dyadic Partnership(DP): A Missing Link Towards Full Autonomy in Medical Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11423)
*Nassir Navab,Zhongliang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了"二元伙伴关系"新范式，让机器人与临床医生进行智能协作，通过生成式AI、多模态意图识别等技术实现决策共享，作为迈向完全自主的可行路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统医疗机器人主要基于远程操作，虽然设计精良但智能有限，将认知和决策留给医生。随着医疗机器人向高级自主性发展，需要探索从部分到完全自主的过渡路径。

Method: 提出二元伙伴关系(DP)范式，通过生成式AI（如世界模型）、多模态意图识别、共同学习框架、高级可视化、可解释的信任感知交互等基础组件实现机器人与医生的智能协作。

Result: 二元伙伴关系被定位为一个强大但可实现、可接受的里程碑，为更安全、更直观的协作和逐步过渡到完全自主提供了有前景的路径。

Conclusion: 二元伙伴关系是医疗机器人从远程操作向完全自主过渡的重要中间阶段，通过智能协作解决数据稀缺、标准化不足和伦理接受度等挑战，为临床环境中的渐进式自主化提供了可行框架。

Abstract: For the past decades medical robotic solutions were mostly based on the concept of tele-manipulation. While their design was extremely intelligent, allowing for better access, improved dexterity, reduced tremor, and improved imaging, their intelligence was limited. They therefore left cognition and decision making to the surgeon. As medical robotics advances towards high-level autonomy, the scientific community needs to explore the required pathway towards partial and full autonomy. Here, we introduce the concept of Dyadic Partnership(DP), a new paradigm in which robots and clinicians engage in intelligent, expert interaction and collaboration. The Dyadic Partners would discuss and agree on decisions and actions during their dynamic and interactive collaboration relying also on intuitive advanced media using generative AI, such as a world model, and advanced multi-modal visualization. This article outlines the foundational components needed to enable such systems, including foundation models for clinical intelligence, multi-modal intent recognition, co-learning frameworks, advanced visualization, and explainable, trust-aware interaction. We further discuss key challenges such as data scarcity, lack of standardization, and ethical acceptance. Dyadic partnership is introduced and is positioned as a powerful yet achievable, acceptable milestone offering a promising pathway toward safer, more intuitive collaboration and a gradual transition to full autonomy across diverse clinical settings.

</details>


### [340] [Safe Human-to-Humanoid Motion Imitation Using Control Barrier Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11447)
*Wenqi Cai,John Abanes,Nikolaos Evangeliou,Anthony Tzes*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 基于视觉的人形机器人运动模仿框架，通过控制屏障函数确保操作安全，避免自碰撞和人机碰撞


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人模仿人类运动时，确保操作安全至关重要，需要避免自碰撞和人机碰撞

Method: 使用单摄像头捕捉人体骨骼关键点，转换为关节角度进行运动重定向；通过控制屏障函数层（CBF）作为二次规划问题过滤模仿指令

Result: 仿真结果验证了该框架在实时碰撞感知运动模仿中的有效性

Conclusion: 提出的视觉框架能够安全地实现人形机器人对人类的运动模仿，通过CBF层有效防止碰撞

Abstract: Ensuring operational safety is critical for human-to-humanoid motion imitation. This paper presents a vision-based framework that enables a humanoid robot to imitate human movements while avoiding collisions. Human skeletal keypoints are captured by a single camera and converted into joint angles for motion retargeting. Safety is enforced through a Control Barrier Function (CBF) layer formulated as a Quadratic Program (QP), which filters imitation commands to prevent both self-collisions and human-robot collisions. Simulation results validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework for real-time collision-aware motion imitation.

</details>


### [341] [DA-PTQ: Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization for Efficient Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11572)
*Siyuan Xu,Tianshi Wang,Fengling Li,Lei Zhu,Heng Tao Shen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对视觉-语言-动作模型的漂移感知后训练量化方法，解决了量化过程中时间误差累积导致的运动轨迹漂移问题，使VLAs能够在资源有限的机器人平台上部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉-语言-动作模型在具身AI中表现出强大潜力，但在资源有限的机器人上部署时面临高内存和计算需求挑战。后训练量化虽然提供高效解决方案，但直接应用于VLAs时会导致顺序控制中的严重性能下降，主要原因是量化扰动在视觉-语言到动作接口处的时间误差累积，引发运动轨迹的动力学漂移。

Method: 提出了漂移感知后训练量化方法，将量化表述为顺序决策过程中的漂移感知优化问题。包含两个核心组件：1）跨空间表示补偿，通过缓解多模态表示与动作空间之间的结构化失真来改善动作一致性；2）运动驱动的混合精度分配，通过最小化轨迹级运动误差来分配比特宽度。

Result: 大量实验表明，DA-PTQ显著减少了动力学漂移，在低比特设置下实现了与全精度模型相当的性能，使VLAs能够在资源有限的机器人平台上实际部署。

Conclusion: 本文提出的漂移感知后训练量化方法有效解决了视觉-语言-动作模型量化中的时间误差累积问题，通过跨空间表示补偿和运动驱动混合精度分配，实现了在资源受限环境下VLAs的高效部署，为具身AI的实际应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) have demonstrated strong potential for embodied AI, yet their deployment on resource-limited robots remains challenging due to high memory and computational demands. While Post-Training Quantization (PTQ) provides an efficient solution, directly applying PTQ to VLAs often results in severe performance degradation during sequential control. We identify temporal error accumulation as a key factor, where quantization perturbations at the vision-language-to-action interface are progressively amplified, leading to kinematic drift in executed trajectories. To address this issue, we propose Drift-Aware Post-Training Quantization (DA-PTQ), which formulates quantization as a drift-aware optimization problem over sequential decision processes. DA-PTQ consists of two components: (1) Cross-Space Representation Compensation, which mitigates structured distortions between multimodal representations and action space to improve action consistency, and (2) Motion-Driven Mixed-Precision Allocation, which assigns bit-widths by minimizing trajectory-level motion errors. Extensive experiments show that DA-PTQ significantly reduces kinematic drift and achieves comparable performance to full-precision models under low-bit settings, enabling practical deployment of VLAs on resource-limited robotic platforms.

</details>


### [342] [Optimal Kinodynamic Motion Planning Through Anytime Bidirectional Heuristic Search with Tight Termination Condition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11587)
*Yi Wang,Bingxian Mu,Shahab Shokouhi,May-Win Thein*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: BTIT*是一种渐近最优的动力学采样运动规划算法，结合了双向启发式搜索和"中间相遇"属性，首次实现了可高效评估终止条件的随时算法，在动力学基准测试中表现优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动力学运动规划算法在时间效率和收敛性方面存在不足，需要一种能够快速找到初始解并高效收敛的算法，特别是在高维动力学系统中。

Method: 提出BTIT*算法，整合了双向启发式搜索（Bi-HS），确保"中间相遇"属性和最优性，采用可高效评估的终止条件实现批处理采样规划中的早期终止。

Result: 实验表明，BTIT*在4D双积分器模型和10D线性化四旋翼两个动力学基准测试中，比代表性非延迟启发式批处理规划器具有更快的首次解时间和更好的收敛性。

Conclusion: BTIT*是首个实现高效终止条件评估的随时MEET风格算法，在动力学运动规划中显著提升了时间效率和收敛性能。

Abstract: This paper introduces Bidirectional Tight Informed Trees (BTIT*), an asymptotically optimal kinodynamic sampling-based motion planning algorithm that integrates an anytime bidirectional heuristic search (Bi-HS) and ensures the \emph{meet-in-the-middle} property (MMP) and optimality (MM-optimality). BTIT* is the first anytime MEET-style algorithm to utilize termination conditions that are efficient to evaluate and enable early termination \emph{on-the-fly} in batch-wise sampling-based motion planning. Experiments show that BTIT* achieves strongly faster time-to-first-solution and improved convergence than representative \emph{non-lazy} informed batch planners on two kinodynamic benchmarks: a 4D double-integrator model and a 10D linearized Quadrotor. The source code is available here.

</details>


### [343] [Micro-Dexterity in Biological Micromanipulation: Embodiment, Perception, and Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11640)
*Kangyi Lu,Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了"微操作灵巧性"框架，用于分析生物微操作中的体现、感知和控制耦合作用，比较了接触式微操作器、无接触场介导系统和多智能体平台等不同架构，并指出了实验室演示与临床生物操作之间的灵巧性差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多生物医学应用需要与生物微对象进行精确和自适应的交互，但在微观尺度上，传统的灵巧操作假设（如刚体接触、稳定抓取和丰富的本体感知反馈）难以维持，需要新的框架来分析和实现有效的微操作。

Method: 该综述引入了微操作灵巧性框架，通过分析体现、感知和控制的耦合作用，比较了三种主要平台：物理交互的具身微机器人、产生无接触操纵力的场介导系统、以及远程驱动的外部驱动末端执行器。同时探讨了推动、重定向、抓取和协同操作等经典操作原语在微观尺度的重新表述。

Result: 该综述系统性地分析了微操作的技术现状，比较了不同架构的优缺点，并回顾了任务执行所需的感知和控制策略。研究发现当前存在实验室演示与临床相关生物操作之间的灵巧性差距。

Conclusion: 微操作灵巧性框架为分析和实现有效的生物微操作提供了理论基础。未来需要解决从实验室到临床转化的关键挑战，包括在流体、受限和表面主导的环境中实现精确的自适应交互。

Abstract: Microscale manipulation has advanced substantially in controlled locomotion and targeted transport, yet many biomedical applications require precise and adaptive interaction with biological micro-objects. At these scales, manipulation is realized through three main classes of platforms: embodied microrobots that physically interact as mobile agents, field-mediated systems that generate contactless trapping or manipulation forces, and externally actuated end-effectors that interact through remotely driven physical tools. Unlike macroscale manipulators, these systems function in fluidic, confined, and surface-dominated environments characterized by negligible inertia, dominant interfacial forces, and soft, heterogeneous, and fragile targets. Consequently, classical assumptions of dexterous manipulation, including rigid-body contact, stable grasping, and rich proprioceptive feedback, become difficult to maintain. This review introduces micro-dexterity as a framework for analyzing biological micromanipulation through the coupled roles of embodiment, perception, and control. We examine how classical manipulation primitives, including pushing, reorientation, grasping, and cooperative manipulation, are reformulated at the microscale; compare the architectures that enable them, from contact-based micromanipulators to contactless field-mediated systems and cooperative multi-agent platforms; and review the perception and control strategies required for task execution. We identify the current dexterity gap between laboratory demonstrations and clinically relevant biological manipulation, and outline key challenges for future translation.

</details>


### [344] [AffordSim: A Scalable Data Generator and Benchmark for Affordance-Aware Robotic Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11674)
*Mingyang Li,Haofan Xu,Haowen Sun,Xinzhe Chen,Sihua Ren,Liqi Huang,Xinyang Sui,Chenyang Miao,Qiongjie Cui,Zeyang Liu,Xingyu Chen,Xuguang Lan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AffordSim是首个集成开放词汇3D功能预测的机器人操作数据生成框架，通过VoxAfford模型预测物体功能区域，指导任务相关的抓取和操作轨迹生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真数据生成平台缺乏物体功能信息，无法自动生成需要与特定功能区域精确交互的任务轨迹（如抓取杯子把手、从杯沿倒水等）。

Method: 开发AffordSim框架，集成VoxAfford开放词汇3D功能检测器，使用MLLM输出令牌增强多尺度几何特征，预测点云上的功能图，指导抓取姿态估计。基于NVIDIA Isaac Sim构建，支持多机器人平台，结合VLM任务生成和基于DA3的3D高斯重建域随机化。

Result: 在7个类别50个任务上建立基准测试，评估4种模仿学习方法。结果显示抓取任务基本解决（53-93%成功率），但需要功能感知的任务如向窄容器倒水（1-43%）和挂杯子（0-47%）对现有方法仍极具挑战。零样本仿真到真实实验验证了生成数据的可迁移性。

Conclusion: 功能感知数据生成对复杂操作任务至关重要，现有模仿学习方法在处理需要精确功能交互的任务时仍存在显著差距，AffordSim为解决这一问题提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Simulation-based data generation has become a dominant paradigm for training robotic manipulation policies, yet existing platforms do not incorporate object affordance information into trajectory generation. As a result, tasks requiring precise interaction with specific functional regions--grasping a mug by its handle, pouring from a cup's rim, or hanging a mug on a hook--cannot be automatically generated with semantically correct trajectories. We introduce AffordSim, the first simulation framework that integrates open-vocabulary 3D affordance prediction into the manipulation data generation pipeline. AffordSim uses our VoxAfford model, an open-vocabulary 3D affordance detector that enhances MLLM output tokens with multi-scale geometric features, to predict affordance maps on object point clouds, guiding grasp pose estimation toward task-relevant functional regions. Built on NVIDIA Isaac Sim with cross-embodiment support (Franka FR3, Panda, UR5e, Kinova), VLM-powered task generation, and novel domain randomization using DA3-based 3D Gaussian reconstruction from real photographs, AffordSim enables automated, scalable generation of affordance-aware manipulation data. We establish a benchmark of 50 tasks across 7 categories (grasping, placing, stacking, pushing/pulling, pouring, mug hanging, long-horizon composite) and evaluate 4 imitation learning baselines (BC, Diffusion Policy, ACT, Pi 0.5). Our results reveal that while grasping is largely solved (53-93% success), affordance-demanding tasks such as pouring into narrow containers (1-43%) and mug hanging (0-47%) remain significantly more challenging for current imitation learning methods, highlighting the need for affordance-aware data generation. Zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on a real Franka FR3 validate the transferability of the generated data.

</details>


### [345] [Dual-Control Frequency-Aware Diffusion Model for Depth-Dependent Optical Microrobot Microscopy Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11680)
*Lan Wei,Zongcai Tan,Kangyi Lu,Jian-Qing Zheng,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Du-FreqNet：一种用于光学显微镜图像合成的双控制频率感知扩散模型，通过编码3D点云和深度特定网格层，结合自适应频域损失，显著提升图像生成质量，支持微机器人3D感知任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 光学微机器人需要准确的3D感知以实现自主操作，但高质量显微镜数据集稀缺。现有GAN方法难以复现关键光学特性（如深度相关的衍射和散焦效应）。

Method: 提出Du-FreqNet：双控制频率感知扩散模型，包含两个独立的ControlNet分支分别编码微机器人3D点云和深度特定网格层，引入自适应频域损失，基于到焦平面的距离动态重加权高频和低频分量，利用可微分的FFT监督。

Result: 在有限数据集（如每个姿态80张图像）上训练，模型实现可控的深度相关图像合成，SSIM比基线提升20.7%。实验表明模型能有效泛化到未见姿态，显著提升下游任务（如3D姿态和深度估计）性能。

Conclusion: Du-FreqNet能够生成物理一致的显微镜图像，有效解决数据稀缺问题，提升微机器人系统的3D感知和闭环控制能力。

Abstract: Optical microrobots actuated by optical tweezers (OT) are important for cell manipulation and microscale assembly, but their autonomous operation depends on accurate 3D perception. Developing such perception systems is challenging because large-scale, high-quality microscopy datasets are scarce, owing to complex fabrication processes and labor-intensive annotation. Although generative AI offers a promising route for data augmentation, existing generative adversarial network (GAN)-based methods struggle to reproduce key optical characteristics, particularly depth-dependent diffraction and defocus effects. To address this limitation, we propose Du-FreqNet, a dual-control, frequency-aware diffusion model for physically consistent microscopy image synthesis. The framework features two independent ControlNet branches to encode microrobot 3D point clouds and depth-specific mesh layers, respectively. We introduce an adaptive frequency-domain loss that dynamically reweights high- and low-frequency components based on the distance to the focal plane. By leveraging differentiable FFT-based supervision, Du-FreqNet captures physically meaningful frequency distributions often missed by pixel-space methods. Trained on a limited dataset (e.g., 80 images per pose), our model achieves controllable, depth-dependent image synthesis, improving SSIM by 20.7% over baselines. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Du-FreqNet generalizes effectively to unseen poses and significantly enhances downstream tasks, including 3D pose and depth estimation, thereby facilitating robust closed-loop control in microrobotic systems.

</details>


### [346] [ACT: Automated CPS Testing for Open-Source Robotic Platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11708)
*Aditya A. Krishnan,Donghoon Kim,Hokeun Kim*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出ACT方法，用于对开源CPS软件进行自动化持续测试，集成到GitHub等开源基础设施中，通过案例研究验证其能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开源CPS软件往往缺乏涉及机器人平台的鲁棒测试，导致关键错误未被发现，特别是在多个模块由不同开源贡献者开发时，这一问题尤为突出。

Method: 提出自动化CPS测试（ACT）方法，将开源软件与其机器人平台进行自动化、持续测试，并集成到GitHub等开源基础设施中。

Result: 实现ACT原型，并在一个使用教育机器人平台的开源CPS上进行案例研究，展示了该方法的能力。

Conclusion: ACT方法能够有效解决开源CPS软件测试不足的问题，通过自动化持续测试提高软件质量。

Abstract: Open-source software for cyber-physical systems (CPS) often lacks robust testing involving robotic platforms, resulting in critical errors that remain undetected. This is especially challenging when multiple modules of CPS software are developed by various open-source contributors. To address this gap, we propose Automated CPS Testing (ACT) that performs automated, continuous testing of open-source software with its robotic platforms, integrated with the open-source infrastructure such as GitHub. We implement an ACT prototype and conduct a case study on an open-source CPS with an educational robotic platform to demonstrate its capabilities.

</details>


### [347] [Multi-ORFT: Stable Online Reinforcement Fine-Tuning for Multi-Agent Diffusion Planning in Cooperative Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11734)
*Haojie Bai,Aimin Li,Ruoyu Yao,Xiongwei Zhao,Tingting Zhang,Xing Zhang,Lin Gao,and Jun Ma*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Multi-ORFT结合场景条件扩散预训练和稳定在线强化学习后训练，提升多智能体协同驾驶的安全性和交通效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散规划器虽然能建模多模态行为，但场景一致性弱，且难以与闭环目标对齐；在反应性多智能体环境中进行稳定的在线后训练仍然困难。

Method: 提出Multi-ORFT：1）预训练阶段使用智能体间自注意力、交叉注意力和AdaLN-Zero场景条件来提升联合轨迹的场景一致性和道路遵循性；2）后训练阶段设计双层MDP，暴露反向核似然用于在线优化，结合密集轨迹级奖励和方差门控组相对策略优化（VG-GRPO）稳定训练。

Result: 在WOMD闭环基准测试中，相比预训练规划器，碰撞率从2.04%降至1.89%，偏离道路率从1.68%降至1.36%，平均速度从8.36提升至8.61 m/s；优于SMART-large、SMART-tiny-CLSFT和VBD等强基线。

Conclusion: 将场景一致的去噪与稳定的在线扩散策略优化相结合，能显著提升闭环协同驾驶的可靠性。

Abstract: Closed-loop cooperative driving requires planners that generate realistic multimodal multi-agent trajectories while improving safety and traffic efficiency. Existing diffusion planners can model multimodal behaviors from demonstrations, but they often exhibit weak scene consistency and remain poorly aligned with closed-loop objectives; meanwhile, stable online post-training in reactive multi-agent environments remains difficult. We present Multi-ORFT, which couples scene-conditioned diffusion pre-training with stable online reinforcement post-training. In pre-training, the planner uses inter-agent self-attention, cross-attention, and AdaLN-Zero-based scene conditioning to improve scene consistency and road adherence of joint trajectories. In post-training, we formulate a two-level MDP that exposes step-wise reverse-kernel likelihoods for online optimization, and combine dense trajectory-level rewards with variance-gated group-relative policy optimization (VG-GRPO) to stabilize training. On the WOMD closed-loop benchmark, Multi-ORFT reduces collision rate from 2.04% to 1.89% and off-road rate from 1.68% to 1.36%, while increasing average speed from 8.36 to 8.61 m/s relative to the pre-trained planner, and it outperforms strong open-source baselines including SMART-large, SMART-tiny-CLSFT, and VBD on the primary safety and efficiency metrics. These results show that coupling scene-consistent denoising with stable online diffusion-policy optimization improves the reliability of closed-loop cooperative driving.

</details>


### [348] [Grounded World Model for Semantically Generalizable Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11751)
*Quanyi Li,Lan Feng,Haonan Zhang,Wuyang Li,Letian Wang,Alexandre Alahi,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于视觉-语言对齐潜在空间的接地世界模型（GWM），用于改进视觉运动模型预测控制（MPC），使动作评分基于未来结果与任务指令的相似性，而非与预设目标图像的比较。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统视觉运动MPC需要预先获得目标图像，但在新环境中难以实现，且通过图像传达目标相比自然语言交互性有限。作者希望开发一种更灵活、更语义化的控制方法。

Method: 提出学习一个接地世界模型（GWM），在视觉-语言对齐的潜在空间中预测动作的未来结果，然后根据预测结果与任务指令的嵌入相似性来评分动作，实现从视觉运动MPC到视觉语言对齐（VLA）的转变。

Result: 在提出的WISER基准测试中，GWM-MPC在288个包含未见视觉信号和指代表达式的测试任务上达到87%的成功率，而传统VLA方法虽然训练集成功率90%，但测试集平均成功率仅为22%。

Conclusion: GWM-MPC通过将视觉运动MPC转化为视觉语言对齐系统，在语义泛化方面超越了基于VLM的VLA方法，能够更好地处理未见环境和自然语言指令，实现了更灵活、更通用的机器人控制。

Abstract: In Model Predictive Control (MPC), world models predict the future outcomes of various action proposals, which are then scored to guide the selection of the optimal action. For visuomotor MPC, the score function is a distance metric between a predicted image and a goal image, measured in the latent space of a pretrained vision encoder like DINO and JEPA. However, it is challenging to obtain the goal image in advance of the task execution, particularly in new environments. Additionally, conveying the goal through an image offers limited interactivity compared with natural language. In this work, we propose to learn a Grounded World Model (GWM) in a vision-language-aligned latent space. As a result, each proposed action is scored based on how close its future outcome is to the task instruction, reflected by the similarity of embeddings. This approach transforms the visuomotor MPC to a VLA that surpasses VLM-based VLAs in semantic generalization. On the proposed WISER benchmark, GWM-MPC achieves a 87% success rate on the test set comprising 288 tasks that feature unseen visual signals and referring expressions, yet remain solvable with motions demonstrated during training. In contrast, traditional VLAs achieve an average success rate of 22%, even though they overfit the training set with a 90% success rate.

</details>


### [349] [StarVLA-$α$: Reducing Complexity in Vision-Language-Action Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11757)
*Jinhui Ye,Ning Gao,Senqiao Yang,Jinliang Zheng,Zixuan Wang,Yuxin Chen,Pengguang Chen,Yilun Chen,Shu Liu,Jiaya Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: StarVLA-α是一个简单但强大的Vision-Language-Action模型基线，旨在通过最小化架构复杂性来系统研究VLA设计选择，在多个基准测试中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前VLA模型领域存在高度碎片化和复杂性，不同方法在架构、训练数据、具身配置等方面差异很大，难以进行系统比较和分析。

Method: 采用简单的架构设计，最小化架构和流程复杂性，系统评估动作建模策略、机器人特定预训练、接口工程等关键设计轴，在LIBERO、SimplerEnv、RoboTwin、RoboCasa等多个基准上进行统一训练。

Result: 简单的基线模型在多个基准测试中保持高度竞争力，表明强大的VLM骨干结合最小化设计足以实现强性能，无需额外架构复杂性或工程技巧。单一通用模型在公开的真实世界RoboChallenge基准上比π₀.₅高出20%。

Conclusion: StarVLA-α为VLA研究提供了坚实的起点，证明简单设计结合强大VLM骨干足以实现优异性能，为未来VLA研究提供了可靠的基线。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for building general-purpose robotic agents. However, the VLA landscape remains highly fragmented and complex: as existing approaches vary substantially in architectures, training data, embodiment configurations, and benchmark-specific engineering. In this work, we introduce StarVLA-$α$, a simple yet strong baseline designed to study VLA design choices under controlled conditions. StarVLA-$α$ deliberately minimizes architectural and pipeline complexity to reduce experimental confounders and enable systematic analysis. Specifically, we re-evaluate several key design axes, including action modeling strategies, robot-specific pretraining, and interface engineering. Across unified multi-benchmark training on LIBERO, SimplerEnv, RoboTwin, and RoboCasa, the same simple baseline remains highly competitive, indicating that a strong VLM backbone combined with minimal design is already sufficient to achieve strong performance without relying on additional architectural complexity or engineering tricks. Notably, our single generalist model outperforms $π_{0.5}$ by 20\% on the public real-world RoboChallenge benchmark. We expect StarVLA-$α$ to serve as a solid starting point for future research in the VLA regime. Code will be released at https://github.com/starVLA/starVLA.

</details>


### [350] [Identifying Inductive Biases for Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11768)
*Apoorv Vaish,Oliver Brock*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过识别共设计空间中的归纳偏置模式，开发出能自适应任务特定结构的高效机器人形态与控制共设计算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人形态与控制的协同设计能实现类似生物体的协同交互，但这是一个高维搜索问题。需要找到适合其结构的归纳偏置来使搜索可行。

Method: 分析软体机器人在运动和操作任务中的共设计景观，识别出三个跨区域一致的模式：质量沿低维流形变化，高质量区域变化分布在更多维度且形态与控制紧密耦合。基于这些洞察设计自适应算法，在搜索过程中推断任务特定结构。

Result: 提出的算法比基准算法提高了36%的改进，并实现了超过两个数量级的样本效率提升，证明了利用归纳偏置进行共设计的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过识别共设计空间中的结构模式并自适应地利用这些归纳偏置，可以显著提高机器人形态与控制协同设计的效率和效果。

Abstract: Co-designing a robot's morphology and control can ensure synergistic interactions between them, prevalent in biological organisms. However, co-design is a high-dimensional search problem. To make this search tractable, we need a systematic method for identifying inductive biases tailored to its structure. In this paper, we analyze co-design landscapes for soft locomotion and manipulation tasks and identify three patterns that are consistent across regions of their co-design spaces. We observe that within regions of co-design space, quality varies along a low-dimensional manifold. Higher-quality regions exhibit variations spread across more dimensions, while tightly coupling morphology and control. We leverage these insights to devise an efficient co-design algorithm. Since the precise instantiation of this structure varies across tasks and is not known a priori, our algorithm infers it from information gathered during search and adapts to each task's specific structure. This yields $36\%$ more improvement than benchmark algorithms. Moreover, our algorithm achieved more than two orders of magnitude in sample efficiency compared to these benchmark algorithms, demonstrating the effectiveness of leveraging inductive biases to co-design.

</details>


### [351] [Disentangled Point Diffusion for Precise Object Placement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11793)
*Lyuxing He,Eric Cai,Shobhit Aggarwal,Jianjun Wang,David Held*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAX-DPD是一个分层解耦的点扩散框架，用于目标物体放置姿态预测，在放置精度、多模态覆盖和泛化能力方面达到最先进水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 端到端策略虽然表达能力强且灵活，但在泛化到新物体几何形状和实现高精度方面存在困难。目标预测范式提供了模块化的问题分解方法，但需要更精确的解决方案。

Method: 提出分层解耦点扩散框架：1) 使用前馈密集高斯混合模型建模全局场景级放置，生成空间密集先验；2) 使用解耦点云扩散模块分别扩散物体几何和放置框架，实现精确的局部几何推理。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界的高精度工业插入任务中验证了方法有效性，点云扩散比基于SE(3)-扩散的方法精度更高，在模拟布料悬挂任务中进一步放松了物体刚性的假设。

Conclusion: TAX-DPD框架在放置精度、多模态覆盖和泛化能力方面表现优异，能够处理刚性物体放置，并扩展到了非刚性物体任务，展示了目标预测范式的强大潜力。

Abstract: Recent advances in robotic manipulation have highlighted the effectiveness of learning from demonstration. However, while end-to-end policies excel in expressivity and flexibility, they struggle both in generalizing to novel object geometries and in attaining a high degree of precision. An alternative, object-centric approach frames the task as predicting the placement pose of the target object, providing a modular decomposition of the problem. Building on this goal-prediction paradigm, we propose TAX-DPD, a hierarchical, disentangled point diffusion framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance in placement precision, multi-modal coverage, and generalization to variations in object geometries and scene configurations. We model global scene-level placements through a novel feed-forward Dense Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM) that yields a spatially dense prior over global placements; we then model the local object-level configuration through a novel disentangled point cloud diffusion module that separately diffuses the object geometry and the placement frame, enabling precise local geometric reasoning. Interestingly, we demonstrate that our point cloud diffusion achieves substantially higher accuracy than a prior approach based on SE(3)-diffusion, even in the context of rigid object placement. We validate our approach across a suite of challenging tasks in simulation and in the real-world on high-precision industrial insertion tasks. Furthermore, we present results on a cloth-hanging task in simulation, indicating that our framework can further relax assumptions on object rigidity.

</details>


### [352] [ComSim: Building Scalable Real-World Robot Data Generation via Compositional Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11386)
*Yiran Qin,Jiahua Ma,Li Kang,Wenzhan Li,Yihang Jiao,Xin Wen,Xiufeng Song,Heng Zhou,Jiwen Yu,Zhenfei Yin,Xihui Liu,Philip Torr,Yilun Du,Ruimao Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Compositional Simulation混合方法，结合经典模拟和神经模拟生成准确的动作-视频对，通过闭环真实-模拟-真实数据增强流程，用少量真实数据生成大规模多样化训练数据集，显著缩小sim2real领域差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人技术虽受益于基础模型发展，但获取大规模高质量训练数据仍面临挑战：需要大量人工且难以覆盖多样真实环境。现有方法在真实世界一致性方面存在局限。

Method: 提出Compositional Simulation混合方法：1)结合经典模拟和神经模拟生成准确动作-视频对；2)采用闭环真实-模拟-真实数据增强流程；3)用少量真实数据训练神经模拟器，将经典模拟视频转换为真实世界表示。

Result: 实验表明该方法显著减少sim2real领域差距，在真实世界策略模型训练中获得更高成功率，为生成鲁棒训练数据和弥合模拟与真实机器人差距提供了可扩展解决方案。

Conclusion: Compositional Simulation方法通过混合模拟技术有效解决了机器人训练数据稀缺问题，能够生成大规模多样化且保持真实一致性的数据集，为机器人学习提供了更高效的数据生成途径。

Abstract: Recent advancements in foundational models, such as large language models and world models, have greatly enhanced the capabilities of robotics, enabling robots to autonomously perform complex tasks. However, acquiring large-scale, high-quality training data for robotics remains a challenge, as it often requires substantial manual effort and is limited in its coverage of diverse real-world environments. To address this, we propose a novel hybrid approach called Compositional Simulation, which combines classical simulation and neural simulation to generate accurate action-video pairs while maintaining real-world consistency. Our approach utilizes a closed-loop real-sim-real data augmentation pipeline, leveraging a small amount of real-world data to generate diverse, large-scale training datasets that cover a broader spectrum of real-world scenarios. We train a neural simulator to transform classical simulation videos into real-world representations, improving the accuracy of policy models trained in real-world environments. Through extensive experiments, we demonstrate that our method significantly reduces the sim2real domain gap, resulting in higher success rates in real-world policy model training. Our approach offers a scalable solution for generating robust training data and bridging the gap between simulated and real-world robotics.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [353] [The Diffusion-Attention Connection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09560)
*Julio Candanedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文揭示了Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子之间的统一性，它们都是基于预softmax查询分数构建的单一马尔可夫几何的不同表现形式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子被视为独立工具，本文旨在揭示它们之间的深层联系，建立统一的数学框架。

Method: 定义QK"双向散度"，通过指数化和归一化得到注意力、扩散映射和磁扩散；使用专家乘积和薛定谔桥将它们组织为平衡态、非平衡稳态和驱动动力学。

Result: 成功构建了统一框架，将Transformer注意力机制、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子表示为同一马尔可夫几何的不同状态。

Conclusion: Transformer、扩散映射和磁拉普拉斯算子在数学本质上具有统一性，可以通过统一的马尔可夫几何框架进行理解和组织。

Abstract: Transformers, diffusion-maps, and magnetic Laplacians are usually treated as separate tools; we show they are all different regimes of a single Markov geometry built from pre-softmax query-scores. We define a QK "bidivergence" whose exponentiated and normalized forms yield attention, diffusion-maps, and magnetic diffusion. And use product of experts and Schrödinger-bridges to connect and organize them into equilibrium, nonequilibrium steady-state, and driven dynamics.

</details>


### [354] [Fairboard: a quantitative framework for equity assessment of healthcare models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09656)
*James K. Ruffle,Samia Mohinta,Chris Foulon,Mohamad Zeina,Zicheng Wang,Sebastian Brandner,Harpreet Hyare,Parashkev Nachev*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究评估了18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型的公平性，发现患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能差异，临床因素比模型架构更能预测分割准确性，并开发了Fairboard工具来降低医疗影像中公平性监测的门槛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管FDA已授权超过1000个AI医疗设备，但正式的公平性评估（模型在不同患者亚组中的表现是否一致）仍然很少。该研究旨在评估脑肿瘤分割模型在不同患者群体中的公平性表现。

Method: 研究评估了18个开源脑肿瘤分割模型在648名胶质瘤患者（来自两个独立数据集，共11,664个模型推断）上的表现。采用多维评估方法：单变量分析、贝叶斯多变量分析、空间分析和表征分析。还开发了Fairboard开源无代码仪表板。

Result: 患者身份比模型选择更能解释性能差异；临床因素（分子诊断、肿瘤分级、切除范围）比模型架构更能预测分割准确性；空间元分析发现神经解剖学定位的偏差具有区域特异性但跨模型一致；在高维潜在空间中，模型性能显著聚集；新模型趋向更公平但都缺乏正式公平性保证。

Conclusion: 脑肿瘤分割模型存在系统性公平性问题，患者特征空间包含算法脆弱性轴。尽管新模型趋向更公平，但需要正式的公平性保证。Fairboard工具可帮助降低医疗影像中公平性监测的门槛。

Abstract: Despite there now being more than 1,000 FDA-authorised AI medical devices, formal equity assessments -- whether model performance is uniform across patient subgroups -- are rare. Here, we evaluate the equity of 18 open-source brain tumour segmentation models across 648 glioma patients from two independent datasets (n = 11,664 model inferences) along distinct univariate, Bayesian multivariate, spatial, and representational dimensions. We find that patient identity consistently explains more performance variance than model choice, with clinical factors, including molecular diagnosis, tumour grade, and extent of resection, predicting segmentation accuracy more strongly than model architecture. A voxel-wise spatial meta-analysis identifies neuroanatomically localised biases that are compartment-specific yet often consistent across models. Within a high-dimensional latent space of lesion masks and clinic-demographic features, model performance clusters significantly, indicating that the patient feature space contains axes of algorithmic vulnerability. Although newer models tend toward greater equity, none provide a formal fairness guarantee. Lastly, we release Fairboard, an open-source, no-code dashboard that lowers barriers to equitable model monitoring in medical imaging.

</details>


### [355] [Deliberative Alignment is Deep, but Uncertainty Remains: Inference time safety improvement in reasoning via attribution of unsafe behavior to base model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09665)
*Pankayaraj Pathmanathan,Furong Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了深思对齐（deliberative alignment）对语言模型安全性的影响，发现即使通过这种对齐方法，学生模型仍会保留基础模型的不安全行为，并提出了一种基于BoN采样的方法来提升安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管拒绝训练在LLMs中的广泛应用提升了模型安全性，但现有对齐方法存在浅层性问题。深思对齐通过从更强推理模型蒸馏推理能力来植入更深层次的安全性，但其实际效果和局限性需要深入研究。

Method: 首先揭示教师模型与学生模型之间存在对齐差距，然后提出BoN采样方法，在潜在空间中将不安全行为归因于基础LLMs，从而降低不安全响应的排名。该方法在7个教师模型和6个学生模型上进行了验证。

Result: BoN采样方法在多个安全基准测试中显著提升了安全性：DAN基准攻击成功率降低28.2%，WildJailbreak降低31.3%，StrongREJECT降低35.4%，且效用损失最小。这些安全增益在RL训练后仍然保持。

Conclusion: 深思对齐虽然能提升安全性，但仍会保留基础模型的不安全行为。提出的BoN采样方法能有效归因不安全行为并提升安全性，同时保持模型效用，这突显了安全推理中的不确定性及其对基础模型的明确归因的重要性。

Abstract: While the wide adoption of refusal training in large language models (LLMs) has showcased improvements in model safety, recent works have highlighted shortcomings due to the shallow nature of these alignment methods. To this end, the work on Deliberative alignment proposed distilling reasoning capabilities from stronger reasoning models, thereby instilling deeper safety in LLMs. In this work, we study the impact of deliberative alignment in language models. First, we show that despite being larger in model size and stronger in safety capability, there exists an alignment gap between teacher and student language models, which affects both the safety and general utility of the student model. Furthermore, we show that models aligned through deliberative alignment can retain unsafe behaviors from the base model despite learning the reasoning patterns of larger reasoning models. Building upon this observation, we propose a BoN sampling method that attributes the unsafe behavior back to the base LLMs in the latent space, thereby down-ranking unsafe responses to gain a meaningful improvement in model safety across multiple safety benchmarks with minimal loss in utility. In particular, across 7 teacher models and 6 student models of different classes and sizes, we show an average attack success rate (ASR) reduction of 28.2% in DAN, 31.3% in WildJailbreak and 35.4 % in StrongREJECT benchmarks. We further show that these safety gains prevail post RL training, thus highlighting the uncertainty in safety reasoning and it's explicit attribution to the base model.

</details>


### [356] [Human-like Working Memory Interference in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09670)
*Hua-Dong Xiong,Li Ji-An,Jiaqi Huang,Robert C. Wilson,Kwonjoon Lee,Xue-Xin Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLMs表现出与人类相似的工作记忆限制，包括负载效应、近因偏差和刺激统计影响，这些限制源于表征干扰而非直接复制记忆项。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究为什么拥有注意力机制的大语言模型（LLMs）仍会表现出工作记忆限制，以及这些限制是否与人类工作记忆的限制有相似的计算机制。

Method: 通过训练双层transformer完美解决工作记忆任务，然后测试多种预训练LLMs在工作记忆任务上的表现，分析其错误模式，并设计干预实验验证表征干扰的作用。

Result: LLMs表现出与人类相似的工作记忆限制：性能随记忆负载增加而下降，存在近因偏差和刺激统计影响。模型使用纠缠表征编码多个记忆项，成功回忆依赖于干扰控制。通过抑制刺激内容信息的干预能提高性能。

Conclusion: 表征干扰是预训练LLMs工作记忆的核心限制因素，表明生物和人工系统中的工作记忆限制可能反映了共同的挑战：在干扰下选择任务相关信息。

Abstract: Intelligent systems must maintain and manipulate task-relevant information online to adapt to dynamic environments and changing goals. This capacity, known as working memory, is fundamental to human reasoning and intelligence. Despite having on the order of 100 billion neurons, both biological and artificial systems exhibit limitations in working memory. This raises a key question: why do large language models (LLMs) show such limitations, given that transformers have full access to prior context through attention? We find that although a two-layer transformer can be trained to solve working memory tasks perfectly, a diverse set of pretrained LLMs continues to show working memory limitations. Notably, LLMs reproduce interference signatures observed in humans: performance degrades with increasing memory load and is biased by recency and stimulus statistics. Across models, stronger working memory capacity correlates with broader competence on standard benchmarks, mirroring its link to general intelligence in humans. Yet despite substantial variability in working memory performance, LLMs surprisingly converge on a common computational mechanism. Rather than directly copying the relevant memory item from context, models encode multiple memory items in entangled representations, such that successful recall depends on interference control -- actively suppressing task-irrelevant content to isolate the target for readout. Moreover, a targeted intervention that suppresses stimulus content information improves performance, providing causal support for representational interference. Together, these findings identify representational interference as a core constraint on working memory in pretrained LLMs, suggesting that working-memory limits in biological and artificial systems may reflect a shared computational challenge: selecting task-relevant information under interference.

</details>


### [357] [Belief-State RWKV for Reinforcement Learning under Partial Observability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09671)
*Liu Xiao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于RWKV循环序列模型的强化学习增强框架，将固定大小的循环状态明确解释为信念状态而非不透明的隐藏向量，通过维护紧凑的不确定性感知状态来提高在部分可观测环境中的控制性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统固定状态策略在部分可观测环境中存在关键弱点：它们可以存储证据信息，但无法有效跟踪置信度或不确定性。当环境存在隐藏噪声或部分可观测性时，这种不确定性感知的缺失会限制策略的性能和鲁棒性。

Method: 方法将RWKV循环模型的固定大小循环状态重新解释为信念状态 b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t)，其中μ_t表示均值信念，Σ_t表示不确定性协方差。这种信念状态通过RWKV风格的循环统计量推导得到，使得策略和价值函数可以同时依赖记忆和不确定性信息进行决策。

Result: 在包含隐藏回合级观测噪声的试点强化学习实验中，信念状态策略几乎达到了最佳循环基线的整体性能，同时在最难分布内机制和保留噪声偏移下略微提高了回报。消融研究表明，这种简单的信念读取机制比两种更结构化的扩展（门控记忆控制和特权信念目标）表现更好。

Conclusion: 研究证明了将循环状态明确解释为信念状态的有效性，表明简单的信念读取机制在部分可观测环境中具有优势。结果同时强调了需要更丰富的基准测试来评估不确定性感知策略的性能，当前方法为在RWKV风格模型上进行更强大的强化学习奠定了基础。

Abstract: We propose a stronger formulation of RL on top of RWKV-style recurrent sequence models, in which the fixed-size recurrent state is explicitly interpreted as a belief state rather than an opaque hidden vector. Instead of conditioning policy and value on a single summary h_t, we maintain a compact uncertainty-aware state b_t = (μ_t, Σ_t) derived from RWKV-style recurrent statistics and let control depend on both memory and uncertainty. This design targets a key weakness of plain fixed-state policies in partially observed settings: they may store evidence, but not necessarily confidence. We present the method, a theoretical program, and a pilot RL experiment with hidden episode-level observation noise together with a test-time noise sweep. The pilot shows that belief-state policies nearly match the best recurrent baseline overall while slightly improving return on the hardest in-distribution regime and under a held-out noise shift. Additional ablations show that this simple belief readout is currently stronger than two more structured extensions, namely gated memory control and privileged belief targets, underscoring the need for richer benchmarks.

</details>


### [358] [Active Inference with a Self-Prior in the Mirror-Mark Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09673)
*Dongmin Kim,Hoshinori Kanazawa,Yasuo Kuniyoshi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 通过自先验（self-prior）的单一计算机制，无需外部奖励即可自发产生镜像自我识别行为，为镜像测试提供了简洁的计算解释。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 镜像自我识别测试被广泛用作自我意识的指标，但传统方法需要复杂的认知机制。本研究旨在通过单一的计算机制（自先验）来解释这种行为，无需外部奖励或复杂的认知能力。

Method: 使用Transformer实现的自先验学习熟悉的多感官体验密度；当出现新标记时，学习分布与实际体验的差异通过主动推理驱动标记导向行为。模拟婴儿仅依赖视觉和本体感觉（无触觉输入）在镜子中发现并移除面部贴纸。

Result: 模拟婴儿在约70%的情况下自发发现并移除面部贴纸。移除贴纸后预期自由能显著下降，证实自先验作为区分自我与非自我的内部标准。跨模态采样显示自先验能捕捉视觉-本体感觉关联，作为概率性身体图式。

Conclusion: 自先验为镜像测试的关键行为提供了简洁的计算解释，表明自由能原理可以作为研究自我意识发展起源的统一假设。

Abstract: The mirror self-recognition test evaluates whether a subject touches a mark on its own body that is visible only in a mirror, and is widely used as an indicator of self-awareness. In this study, we present a computational model in which this behavior emerges spontaneously through a single mechanism, the self-prior, without any external reward. The self-prior, implemented with a Transformer, learns the density of familiar multisensory experiences; when a novel mark appears, the discrepancy from this learned distribution drives mark-directed behavior through active inference. A simulated infant, relying solely on vision and proprioception without tactile input, discovered a sticker placed on its own face in the mirror and removed it in approximately 70% of cases without any explicit instruction. Expected free energy decreased significantly after sticker removal, confirming that the self-prior operates as an internal criterion for distinguishing self from non-self. Cross-modal sampling further demonstrated that the self-prior captures visual--proprioceptive associations, functioning as a probabilistic body schema. These results provide a concise computational account of the key behavior observed in the mirror test and suggest that the free energy principle can serve as a unifying hypothesis for investigating the developmental origins of self-awareness. Code is available at: https://github.com/kim135797531/self-prior-mirror

</details>


### [359] [A Comparative Theoretical Analysis of Entropy Control Methods in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09676)
*Ming Lei,Christophe Baehr*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对LLM强化学习中的两种熵控制策略进行理论分析：传统熵正则化与协方差机制。研究发现传统方法引入密集偏差导致次优策略，而协方差方法能选择性正则化高协方差token并实现渐近无偏性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习已成为增强大语言模型推理能力的关键方法，但可扩展训练常因策略熵快速崩溃而受阻，导致过早收敛和性能饱和。需要深入理解不同熵控制策略的理论特性。

Method: 建立softmax参数化下熵动力学的统一分析框架，证明熵变化由对数概率与logit更新的协方差控制。对比分析传统熵正则化与协方差机制的理论特性。

Result: 传统熵正则化引入密集、持续的偏差，修改平稳条件导致次优策略；协方差方法能选择性正则化高协方差token子集，在正则化系数退火时实现渐近无偏性。

Conclusion: 研究结果为LLM后训练中的熵控制提供了原则性指导，对将RL扩展到更大模型和更复杂推理任务具有重要意义。协方差机制在保持策略多样性和避免过早收敛方面表现更优。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a key approach for enhancing reasoning in large language models (LLMs), yet scalable training is often hindered by the rapid collapse of policy entropy, which leads to premature convergence and performance saturation. This paper provides a comparative theoretical analysis of two entropy control strategies: traditional entropy regularization and the recently proposed covariance-based mechanism. We establish a unified framework for entropy dynamics under softmax parameterization, showing that entropy change is governed by the covariance between log-probabilities and logit updates. Our analysis reveals that traditional entropy regularization introduces a dense, persistent bias that modifies the stationary condition, leading to suboptimal policies, while covariance-based methods selectively regularize a sparse subset of high-covariance tokens and achieve asymptotic unbiasedness when the regularization coefficient is annealed. These results provide principled guidelines for entropy control in LLM posttraining, with implications for scaling RL to larger models and more complex reasoning tasks.

</details>


### [360] [STaR-DRO: Stateful Tsallis Reweighting for Group-Robust Structured Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09737)
*Samah Fodeh,Ganesh Puthiaraju,Elyas Irankhah,Linhai Ma,Srivani Talakokkul,Afshan Khan,Sreeraj Ramachandran,Jordan Alpert,Sarah Schellhorn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个两阶段框架：1) 任务无关提示策略解决结构化生成中的格式漂移、标签歧义等问题；2) STaR-DRO鲁棒优化方法处理组异质性，通过有界超额乘子仅对持续困难组进行加权，在EPPC Miner基准上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构化预测面临本体约束标签生成、证据基础和有效结构构建的挑战，特别是在模糊性、标签偏斜和异质性组难度下。需要解决格式漂移、标签歧义、证据幻觉和元数据条件混淆等问题，同时处理不同组别的学习难度差异。

Method: 1) 任务无关提示策略：结合XML指令结构、消歧规则、验证式推理、模式约束和自验证；2) STaR-DRO：状态鲁棒优化方法，结合Tsallis镜像下降与动量平滑、中心化的组损失信号，使用有界超额乘子仅对持续困难组进行加权。

Result: 提示工程在四个Llama模型上平均提升15.44 F1；在监督微调基础上，STaR-DRO进一步提升最难语义决策：Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct上Code F1从79.24升至81.47，Sub-code F1从67.78升至69.30，同时保持Span性能，在最困难临床类别上验证交叉熵降低29.6%。

Conclusion: 该框架通过可控推理和鲁棒微调，有效解决了结构化预测中的关键挑战。性能提升集中在临床重要但困难的沟通行为类别上，直接增强了患者中心护理分析中沟通挖掘的可靠性，而不仅仅是统计改进。

Abstract: Structured prediction requires models to generate ontology-constrained labels, grounded evidence, and valid structure under ambiguity, label skew, and heterogeneous group difficulty. We present a two-part framework for controllable inference and robust fine-tuning. First, we introduce a task-agnostic prompting strategy that combines XML-based instruction structure, disambiguation rules, verification-style reasoning, schema constraints, and self-validation to address format drift, label ambiguity, evidence hallucination, and metadata-conditioned confusion in in-context structured generation. Second, we introduce STaR-DRO, a stateful robust optimization method for group heterogeneity. It combines Tsallis mirror descent with momentum-smoothed, centered group-loss signals and bounded excess-only multipliers so that only persistently hard groups above a neutral baseline are upweighted, concentrating learning where it is most needed while avoiding volatile, dense exponentiated-gradient reweighting and unnecessary loss from downweighting easier groups. We evaluate the combined framework on EPPC Miner, a benchmark for extracting hierarchical labels and evidence spans from patient-provider secure messages. Prompt engineering improves zero-shot by +15.44 average F1 across Code, Sub-code, and Span over four Llama models. Building on supervised fine-tuning, STaR-DRO further improves the hardest semantic decisions: on Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct, Code F1 rises from 79.24 to 81.47 and Sub-code F1 from 67.78 to 69.30, while preserving Span performance and reducing group-wise validation cross-entropy by up to 29.6% on the most difficult clinical categories. Because these rare and difficult groups correspond to clinically consequential communication behaviors, these gains are not merely statistical improvements: they directly strengthen communication mining reliability for patient-centered care analysis.

</details>


### [361] [ExecTune: Effective Steering of Black-Box LLMs with Guide Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09741)
*Vijay Lingam,Aditya Golatkar,Anwesan Pal,Ben Vo,Narayanan Sadagopan,Alessandro Achille,Jun Huan,Anoop Deoras,Stefano Soatto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，通过引导模型生成结构化策略供黑盒核心模型执行，以降低推理成本。研究发现现有方法在可执行性优化上存在不足，提出了ExecTune训练方法，在数学推理和代码生成任务上实现精度提升和成本降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 对于通过黑盒API部署的大语言模型，重复推理成本往往超过一次性训练成本。这促使需要构建能够将昂贵推理分摊到可重用中间表示的代理系统，以降低长期部署成本。

Method: 提出Guide-Core Policies (GCoP)框架，其中引导模型生成结构化策略，由黑盒核心模型执行。针对现有方法在可执行性优化上的不足，提出了ExecTune训练方法，结合教师引导的接受采样、监督微调和结构感知强化学习，直接优化语法有效性、执行成功率和成本效率。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，使用ExecTune的GCoP相比现有最佳基线，精度提升高达9.2%，推理成本降低高达22.4%。Claude Haiku 3.5在数学和代码任务上表现优于Sonnet 3.5，且以38%更低的成本达到与Sonnet 4仅差1.7%绝对精度的水平。

Conclusion: GCoP框架通过优化可执行性有效降低了黑盒大语言模型的推理成本，ExecTune训练方法显著提升了系统性能。该框架还支持模块化适配，可通过更新引导模型而不重新训练核心模型来实现系统改进。

Abstract: For large language models deployed through black-box APIs, recurring inference costs often exceed one-time training costs. This motivates composed agentic systems that amortize expensive reasoning into reusable intermediate representations. We study a broad class of such systems, termed Guide-Core Policies (GCoP), in which a guide model generates a structured strategy that is executed by a black-box core model. This abstraction subsumes base, supervised, and advisor-style approaches, which differ primarily in how the guide is trained. We formalize GCoP under a cost-sensitive utility objective and show that end-to-end performance is governed by guide-averaged executability: the probability that a strategy generated by the guide can be faithfully executed by the core. Our analysis shows that existing GCoP instantiations often fail to optimize executability under deployment constraints, resulting in brittle strategies and inefficient computation. Motivated by these insights, we propose ExecTune, a principled training recipe that combines teacher-guided acceptance sampling, supervised fine-tuning, and structure-aware reinforcement learning to directly optimize syntactic validity, execution success, and cost efficiency. Across mathematical reasoning and code-generation benchmarks, GCoP with ExecTune improves accuracy by up to 9.2% over prior state-of-the-art baselines while reducing inference cost by up to 22.4%. It enables Claude Haiku 3.5 to outperform Sonnet 3.5 on both math and code tasks, and to come within 1.7% absolute accuracy of Sonnet 4 at 38% lower cost. Beyond efficiency, GCoP also supports modular adaptation by updating the guide without retraining the core.

</details>


### [362] [Efficient Matrix Implementation for Rotary Position Embedding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09742)
*Chen Minqi,Zhongqi Yue,Shihao Zhang,Yun Xu,Peng Wu,kaixiang Xu,Zeyi Huang,Hanwang Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RoME是一种高效的旋转位置编码方法，通过矩阵变换替代向量操作，消除了计算开销，在多维场景下实现硬件加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RoPE实现依赖向量级的分割与合并操作，在多维设置中引入显著计算开销，且硬件利用率低，需要更高效的实现方案。

Method: 提出RoME（Rotary Matrix position Embedding），将RoPE的向量操作重新表述为统一的矩阵变换，消除维度特定操作，支持在现代NPU的Cube和Vector单元上并行执行。

Result: 实验表明RoME在算子级别和全模型级别都实现了显著加速，计算效率更高。

Conclusion: RoME提供了与RoPE数学等价但计算更高效的替代方案，简化了实现并提升了硬件利用率，适用于语言、视觉和3D领域的Transformer架构。

Abstract: Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) has become a core component of modern Transformer architectures across language, vision, and 3D domains. However, existing implementations rely on vector-level split and merge operations that introduce non-negligible computational overhead, often overlooked in attention optimization. The problem is further amplified in multi-dimensional settings (e.g., 2D and 3D RoPE), where additional vector operations and uneven feature partitions degrade hardware utilization. To overcome these limitations, we propose RoME (Rotary Matrix position Embedding), a mathematically equivalent yet computationally efficient reformulation of RoPE that replaces vector operations with unified matrix transformations. RoME eliminates dimension-specific operations, simplifies implementation, and enables fused parallel execution across Cube and Vector units on modern NPUs. Experiments show that RoME delivers substantial acceleration at both the operator and full-model levels. The implementation is available at https://gitcode.com/cann/ops-transformer/blob/master/experimental/posembedding/rope_matrix/README.md.

</details>


### [363] [Explainable Human Activity Recognition: A Unified Review of Concepts and Mechanisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09799)
*Mainak Kundu,Catherine Chen,Rifatul Islam,Ismail Uysal,Ria Kanjilal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 对可解释性人类活动识别（XAI-HAR）方法的全面综述，提出了统一框架，涵盖可解释性概念维度和算法解释机制，并讨论了当前挑战和未来方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管深度学习方法在人类活动识别（HAR）方面取得了显著进展，但这些模型通常缺乏可解释性，限制了其在医疗监控、辅助生活等实际应用中的可信度和部署。因此需要可解释人工智能（XAI）方法来使HAR系统更加透明和以人为本。

Method: 本文提出了一个统一框架，将可解释性的概念维度与算法解释机制分开，减少了先前调查中的模糊性。基于这一区分，提出了一个机制中心的XAI-HAR方法分类法，涵盖主要的解释范式。综述还探讨了这些方法如何应对HAR的时间、多模态和语义复杂性。

Result: 对可解释HAR方法进行了系统性的梳理和分类，总结了不同方法的可解释性目标、解释目标和局限性。同时分析了当前的评估实践，并指出了实现可靠和可部署XAI-HAR的关键挑战。

Conclusion: 需要朝着可信赖的活动识别系统方向发展，这些系统能够更好地支持人类理解和决策。本文为XAI-HAR领域提供了统一的视角和分类框架，为该领域的进一步发展奠定了基础。

Abstract: Human activity recognition (HAR) has become a key component of intelligent systems for healthcare monitoring, assistive living, smart environments, and human-computer interaction. Although deep learning has substantially improved HAR performance on multivariate sensor data, the resulting models often remain opaque, limiting trust, reliability, and real-world deployment. Explainable artificial intelligence (XAI) has therefore emerged as a critical direction for making HAR systems more transparent and human-centered. This paper presents a comprehensive review of explainable HAR methods across wearable, ambient, physiological, and multimodal sensing settings. We introduce a unified perspective that separates conceptual dimensions of explainability from algorithmic explanation mechanisms, reducing ambiguities in prior surveys. Building on this distinction, we present a mechanism-centric taxonomy of XAI-HAR methods covering major explanation paradigms. The review examines how these methods address the temporal, multimodal, and semantic complexities of HAR, and summarize their interpretability objectives, explanation targets, and limitations. In addition, we discuss current evaluation practices, highlight key challenges in achieving reliable and deployable XAI-HAR, and outline directions toward trustworthy activity recognition systems that better support human understanding and decision-making.

</details>


### [364] [NeuroFlow: Toward Unified Visual Encoding and Decoding from Neural Activity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09817)
*Weijian Mai,Mu Nan,Yu Zhu,Jiahang Cao,Rui Zhang,Yuqin Dai,Chunfeng Song,Andrew F. Luo,Jiamin Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NeuroFlow是首个统一框架，通过流模型在单个模型中联合建模视觉编码和解码，实现双向一致性建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将视觉编码（从刺激预测脑活动）和解码（从脑活动重建刺激）视为独立任务，需要分别训练模型，这既低效又无法建模编码-解码过程的一致性。

Method: 提出NeuroFlow框架，包含两个核心组件：1) NeuroVAE作为变分骨干网络，建模神经变异性并建立紧凑的语义结构化潜空间；2) 跨模态流匹配(XFM)学习视觉和神经潜分布之间的可逆一致流模型，将编码和解码重新表述为共享潜空间中的时间依赖可逆过程。

Result: NeuroFlow在视觉编码和解码任务上实现了整体性能最优，计算效率高于任何孤立方法。分析表明模型实现了编码-解码一致性，并通过脑功能分析证明NeuroFlow捕捉了与神经变异性一致的活动模式。

Conclusion: NeuroFlow标志着向统一视觉编码-解码建模迈出了重要一步，为未来双向视觉脑机接口提供了机制性见解。

Abstract: Visual encoding and decoding models act as gateways to understanding the neural mechanisms underlying human visual perception. Typically, visual encoding models that predict brain activity from stimuli and decoding models that reproduce stimuli from brain activity are treated as distinct tasks, requiring separate models and training procedures. This separation is inefficient and fails to model the consistency between encoding and decoding processes. To address this limitation, we propose NeuroFlow, the first unified framework that jointly models visual encoding and decoding from neural activity within a single flow model. NeuroFlow introduces two key components: (1) NeuroVAE is designed as a variational backbone to model neural variability and establish a compact, semantically structured latent space for bidirectional modeling across visual and neural modalities. (2) Cross-modal Flow Matching (XFM) bypasses the typical paradigm of noise-to-data diffusion guided by a specific modality condition, instead learning a reversibly consistent flow model between visual and neural latent distributions. For the first time, visual encoding and decoding are reformulated as a time-dependent, reversible process within a shared latent space for unified modeling. Empirical results demonstrate that NeuroFlow achieves superior overall performance in visual encoding and decoding tasks with higher computational efficiency compared to any isolated methods. We further analyze principal factors that steer the model toward encoding-decoding consistency and, through brain functional analyses, demonstrate that NeuroFlow captures consistent activation patterns underlying neural variability. NeuroFlow marks a major step toward unified visual encoding and decoding from neural activity, providing mechanistic insights that inform future bidirectional visual brain-computer interfaces.

</details>


### [365] [Below-ground Fungal Biodiversity Can be Monitored Using Self-Supervised Learning Satellite Features](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09818)
*Robin Young,Michael E. Van Nuland,E. Toby Kiers,Tomáš Větrovský,Petr Kohout,Petr Baldrian,Srinivasan Keshav*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 利用自监督学习处理卫星图像，可以高精度预测地下外生菌根真菌多样性，实现比现有方法高10000倍的空间分辨率，首次实现景观尺度下地下生物多样性的时空监测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前监测菌根真菌生物多样性面临时间和成本限制，90%的菌根多样性热点区域缺乏保护。需要开发能够广泛有效绘制地下真菌群落分布的方法。

Method: 采用自监督学习（SSL）处理卫星图像，结合欧洲和亚洲约12,000个野外样本数据，预测地下外生菌根真菌丰富度。将SSL提取的特征与气候、土壤和土地利用数据进行对比分析。

Result: 模型解释了超过一半的物种丰富度变异。SSL特征成为最有效的预测因子，包含了气候、土壤和土地利用数据中的大部分信息。实现了从1km到10m的10000倍空间分辨率提升，几乎无系统偏差。首次实现了对英国国家公园林地真菌多样性的多年趋势分析，发现古老森林可能以不成比例的速度失去菌根多样性。

Conclusion: SSL卫星特征是一种可扩展的工具，能够将稀疏的野外观测数据转化为连续的高分辨率生物多样性地图，为监测陆地生态系统的"隐形一半"提供了新方法。

Abstract: Mycorrhizal fungi are vital to terrestrial ecosystem functioning. Yet monitoring their biodiversity at landscape scales is often unfeasible due to time and cost constraints. Current predictions suggest that 90\% of mycorrhizal diversity hotspots remain unprotected, opening questions of how to broadly and effectively map underground fungal communities. Here, we show that self-supervised learning (SSL) applied to satellite imagery can predict below-ground ectomycorrhizal fungal richness across diverse environments. Our models explain over half the variance in species richness across ~12,000 field samples spanning Europe and Asia. SSL-derived features prove to be the single most informative predictor, subsuming the majority of information contained in climate, soil, and land cover datasets. Using this approach, we achieve a 10,000-fold increase in spatial resolution over existing techniques, moving from 1km landscape averages to 10m habitat-scale observations with nearly no systematic bias. As satellite observations are dynamic rather than static, this enables temporal monitoring of below-ground biodiversity at landscape scales for the first time. We analyze multi-year trends in predicted fungal richness across UK National Park woodlands, finding that ancient forests may be losing ectomycorrhizal diversity at disproportionate rates. These results establish SSL satellite features as a scalable tool for extending sparse field observations to continuous, high-resolution biodiversity maps for monitoring the invisible half of terrestrial ecosystems.

</details>


### [366] [Relational Preference Encoding in Looped Transformer Internal States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09870)
*Jan Kirin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究者发现循环transformer在内部循环状态中主要以关系性方式编码人类偏好，而非独立评分。他们使用Ouro-2.6B-Thinking模型提取隐藏状态，训练轻量级评估器在Anthropic HH-RLHF数据集上达到95.2%的测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索循环transformer如何在其内部迭代状态中编码人类偏好，特别是理解偏好表示的本质——是独立评分还是关系性编码。

Method: 使用Ouro-2.6B-Thinking（2.6B参数循环transformer）提取每个循环迭代的隐藏状态，训练约5M参数的轻量级评估器头来预测人类偏好。采用成对评估方法，并与独立评分方法对比。引入参数交换协议防止退化解决方案，并进行架构搜索确定性能上限。

Result: 成对评估器在8,552个未见示例上达到95.2%测试准确率，远超全批量L-BFGS探针（84.5%）。研究发现偏好主要编码为关系性：线性探针在成对差异上达到84.5%，而非线性独立评估器仅65%，线性独立分类甚至低于随机水平（21.75%）。研究还发现学习率余弦死区意外起到早停作用，防止过拟合。

Conclusion: 循环transformer内部状态主要编码关系性偏好而非独立评分，评估器实质上是模型内部一致性探针，测量模型自身学习价值系统如何稳定组织其表示。提出翻转测试作为成对偏好评估器的必要诊断工具。

Abstract: We investigate how looped transformers encode human preference in their internal iteration states. Using Ouro-2.6B-Thinking, a 2.6B-parameter looped transformer with iterative refinement, we extract hidden states from each loop iteration and train lightweight evaluator heads (~5M parameters) to predict human preference on the Anthropic HH-RLHF dataset. Our pairwise evaluator achieves 95.2% test accuracy on 8,552 unseen examples, surpassing a full-batch L-BFGS probe (84.5%) while the base model remains completely frozen.
  Our central finding is that loop states encode preference predominantly relationally: a linear probe on pairwise differences achieves 84.5%, the best nonlinear independent evaluator reaches only 65% test accuracy, and linear independent classification scores 21.75%, below chance and with inverted polarity. Interpreted precisely, the evaluator functions as a model-internal consistency probe, measuring how stably Ouro's own learned value system organizes its representations rather than how well it predicts noisy human annotations.
  We also document a systematic architecture search that established a genuine 70% ceiling for independent scoring, and show how the 50% argument-swap protocol required to prevent degenerate pairwise solutions deflated pairwise training metrics by about 31 points at peak, creating the false appearance that pairwise and pointwise evaluators shared the same ceiling.
  Finally, we show that a cosine learning-rate dead zone at epoch 2 accidentally acted as early stopping, preserving the generalization peak before overfitting degraded test accuracy from 95.2% to 62.4% by epoch 5. Cross-epoch flip-test analysis shows that antisymmetry correlation remains stable while strict sign-flip rate mainly tracks scorer bias. We propose the flip test as a mandatory diagnostic for pairwise preference evaluators.

</details>


### [367] [Efficient Personalization of Generative User Interfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09876)
*Yi-Hao Peng,Samarth Das,Jeffrey P. Bigham,Jason Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过分析20名设计师对600个生成UI的成对偏好，发现设计师之间存在显著分歧，并开发了一种基于设计师先验知识的样本高效个性化方法，优于传统UI评估器和多模态模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式UI虽然能按需为用户定制界面，但个性化仍然困难，因为理想的UI属性是主观的、难以明确表达，且从稀疏反馈中推断成本高昂。需要研究如何有效捕捉和利用用户偏好来实现真正的个性化UI生成。

Method: 收集20名专业设计师对600个生成UI的成对偏好判断，分析分歧程度；通过设计师的书面理由分析概念理解差异；开发基于先验设计师而非固定设计概念的样本高效个性化方法，将新用户表示为先前设计师的组合。

Result: 设计师之间存在实质性分歧（平均kappa=0.25），即使使用相似概念如层次结构或简洁性，设计师在定义、优先级和应用上也有差异；个性化偏好模型在技术评估中优于预训练UI评估器和更大规模多模态模型，且能随反馈增加更好扩展；个性化生成方法被12名新设计师优先选择，优于包括直接用户提示在内的基线方法。

Conclusion: 研究发现设计师偏好存在固有差异，轻量级偏好获取可以作为个性化生成UI系统的实用基础，通过将新用户表示为先前设计师的组合，能够实现样本高效的个性化界面生成。

Abstract: Generative user interfaces (UIs) create new opportunities to adapt interfaces to individual users on demand, but personalization remains difficult because desirable UI properties are subjective, hard to articulate, and costly to infer from sparse feedback. We study this problem through a new dataset in which 20 trained designers each provide pairwise judgments over the same 600 generated UIs, enabling direct analysis of preference divergence. We find substantial disagreement across designers (average kappa = 0.25), and written rationales reveal that even when designers appeal to similar concepts such as hierarchy or cleanliness, designers differ in how they define, prioritize, and apply those concepts. Motivated by these findings, we develop a sample-efficient personalization method that represents a new user in terms of prior designers rather than a fixed rubric of design concepts. In a technical evaluation, our preference model outperforms both a pretrained UI evaluator and a larger multimodal model, and scales better with additional feedback. When used to personalize generation, it also produces interfaces preferred by 12 new designers over baseline approaches, including direct user prompting. Our findings suggest that lightweight preference elicitation can serve as a practical foundation for personalized generative UI systems.

</details>


### [368] [SemEnrich: Self-Supervised Semantic Enrichment of Radiology Reports for Vision-Language Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09887)
*Halil Ibrahim Gulluk,Olivier Gevaert*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种自监督数据增强方法，通过语义聚类医学报告句子，添加不同聚类中的阳性/中性观察结果来丰富训练数据，提升医学视觉语言模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学视觉语言数据集通常规模有限且偏向阴性发现，因为临床医生主要报告异常情况，可能会忽略一些阳性/中性发现，这些发现可能被认为与患者病情无关。

Method: 使用自监督数据增强方法：1）对医学报告句子进行语义聚类；2）从不同聚类中添加阳性/中性观察结果来丰富训练数据；3）在GRPO训练中，将语义聚类信息融入奖励设计。

Result: 方法在监督微调中带来一致性能提升（COMET分数平均提升5.63%，Bert分数提升3.04%，Sentence Bleu提升7.40%，CheXbert-F1提升5.30%，RadGraph-F1提升7.47%）。将语义聚类融入GRPO奖励设计后，性能进一步提升（COMET分数平均提升2.78%，Bert分数提升3.14%，Sentence Bleu提升12.80%）。

Conclusion: 通过语义聚类实现的自监督数据增强能有效解决医学数据集偏差问题，提升医学视觉语言模型性能，且该方法可进一步优化强化学习训练过程。

Abstract: Medical vision-language datasets are often limited in size and biased toward negative findings, as clinicians report abnormalities mostly but might omit some positive/neutral findings because they might be considered as irrelevant to the patient's condition. We propose a self-supervised data enrichment method that leverages semantic clustering of report sentences. Then we enrich the findings in the medical reports in the training set by adding positive/neutral observations from different clusters in a self-supervised manner. Our approach yields consistent gains in supervised fine-tuning (5.63%, 3.04%, 7.40%, 5.30%, 7.47% average gains on COMET score, Bert score, Sentence Bleu, CheXbert-F1 and RadGraph-F1 scores respectively). Ablation studies confirm that improvements stem from semantic clustering rather than random augmentation. Furthermore, we introduce a way to incorporate semantic cluster information into the reward design for GRPO training, which leads to further performance gains (2.78%, 3.14%, 12.80% average gains on COMET score, Bert score and Sentence Bleu scores respectively). We share our code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SemEnrich-75CF

</details>


### [369] [Improving Pediatric Emergency Department Triage with Modality Dropout in Late Fusion Multimodal EHR Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09905)
*Tyler Yang,Romal Mitr*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种晚期融合多模态架构，结合XGBoost处理结构化生命体征和Bio_ClinicalBERT处理非结构化临床文本，通过逻辑回归元分类器预测急诊分诊等级。研究重点在于通过对称模态丢弃技术解决模态塌陷问题，提升模型在成人到儿科患者的零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 急诊分诊严重依赖定量生命体征和定性临床记录，但现有多模态模型常因过度依赖结构化数据而出现模态塌陷问题。这严重限制了模型的人口统计学泛化能力，特别是对于儿科患者，其生命体征的发育变化使得非结构化临床叙述尤为关键。

Method: 提出晚期融合多模态架构：1）使用XGBoost处理结构化生命体征数据；2）使用Bio_ClinicalBERT处理非结构化临床文本；3）通过逻辑回归元分类器融合两种模态特征，预测5级急诊严重指数。为提升泛化能力，采用对称模态丢弃技术，在训练时随机丢弃30-40%的模态数据，防止模型过度拟合成人特有的临床相关性。

Result: 多模态框架显著优于单模态基线。在未见过的儿科队列中，应用30-40%对称模态丢弃率使二次加权Kappa提升至0.351，显示出明显的性能改进。这表明模态丢弃是缓解模态塌陷、增强临床AI跨人口统计学泛化能力的关键正则化技术。

Conclusion: 对称模态丢弃技术能有效解决多模态模型中的模态塌陷问题，显著提升模型从成人到儿科患者的零样本泛化能力。这为开发更具人口统计学鲁棒性的临床AI系统提供了重要方法学见解。

Abstract: Emergency department triage relies heavily on both quantitative vital signs and qualitative clinical notes, yet multimodal machine learning models predicting triage acuity often suffer from modality collapse by over-relying on structured tabular data. This limitation severely hinders demographic generalizability, particularly for pediatric patients where developmental variations in vital signs make unstructured clinical narratives uniquely crucial. To address this gap, we propose a late-fusion multimodal architecture that processes tabular vitals via XGBoost and unstructured clinical text via Bio_ClinicalBERT, combined through a Logistic Regression meta-classifier to predict the 5-level Emergency Severity Index. To explicitly target the external validity problem, we train our model exclusively on adult encounters from the MIMIC-IV and NHAMCS datasets and evaluate its zero-shot generalization on a traditionally overlooked pediatric cohort. Furthermore, we employ symmetric modality dropout during training to prevent the ensemble from overfitting to adult-specific clinical correlations. Our results demonstrate that the multimodal framework significantly outperforms single-modality baselines. Most notably, applying a 30-40% symmetric modality dropout rate yielded steep performance improvements in the unseen pediatric cohort, elevating the Quadratic Weighted Kappa to 0.351. These findings highlight modality dropout as a critical regularization technique for mitigating modality collapse and enhancing cross-demographic generalization in clinical AI.

</details>


### [370] [Last-Iterate Convergence of Randomized Kaczmarz and SGD with Greedy Step Size](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09909)
*Michał Dereziński,Xiaoyu Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了SGD在插值条件下对光滑二次型问题的最后迭代收敛性，证明了t次迭代达到O(1/t^{3/4})的收敛速率，改进了先前O(1/t^{1/2})的结果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究SGD在插值条件下对光滑二次型问题的最后迭代收敛性，这一设置涵盖了经典的随机Kaczmarz算法和其他流行的迭代线性系统求解器。Attia等人先前给出了O(1/t^{1/2})的保证，本文旨在改进这一结果

Method: 引入随机收缩过程族，其行为可以通过特定确定性特征值方程的演化来描述，通过细致的离散到连续约简进行分析

Result: 证明了第t次迭代达到O(1/t^{3/4})的收敛速率，改进了先前O(1/t^{1/2})的结果

Conclusion: 本文改进了SGD在插值条件下对光滑二次型问题的最后迭代收敛速率，从O(1/t^{1/2})提升到O(1/t^{3/4})，通过引入随机收缩过程和分析方法为这类问题提供了更优的理论保证

Abstract: We study last-iterate convergence of SGD with greedy step size over smooth quadratics in the interpolation regime, a setting which captures the classical Randomized Kaczmarz algorithm as well as other popular iterative linear system solvers. For these methods, we show that the $t$-th iterate attains an $O(1/t^{3/4})$ convergence rate, addressing a question posed by Attia, Schliserman, Sherman, and Koren, who gave an $O(1/t^{1/2})$ guarantee for this setting. In the proof, we introduce the family of stochastic contraction processes, whose behavior can be described by the evolution of a certain deterministic eigenvalue equation, which we analyze via a careful discrete-to-continuous reduction.

</details>


### [371] [Regularized Entropy Information Adaptation with Temporal-Awareness Networks for Simultaneous Speech Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09916)
*Joseph Liu,Nameer Hirschkind,Xiao Yu,Mahesh Kumar Nandwana*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文改进了REINA同时语音翻译方法，提出了两种策略：REINA-SAN（监督对齐网络）和REINA-TAN（时间步增强网络），解决了信息增益策略缺乏时间上下文导致读取过多音频后才开始写入的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于信息增益的REINA方法在同时语音翻译中存在缺乏时间上下文的问题，导致策略偏向于读取大部分音频后才开始写入，这影响了翻译的实时性和效率。

Method: 提出了两种改进策略：1) REINA-SAN：使用监督对齐网络来指导读取/写入策略；2) REINA-TAN：使用时间步增强网络来增强时间上下文感知。两种方法都旨在平衡翻译质量和延迟。

Result: 两种方法都显著优于基线并解决了稳定性问题。REINA-TAN在流式效率的帕累托前沿表现略优，而REINA-SAN对"读取循环"问题更具鲁棒性。在Whisper模型上，两种方法将流式效率（NoSE分数）提高了高达7.1%。

Conclusion: 通过引入时间上下文感知的改进策略，成功解决了REINA方法在同时语音翻译中的时间偏差问题，显著提高了流式翻译效率，为实时语音翻译提供了更优的解决方案。

Abstract: Simultaneous Speech Translation (SimulST) requires balancing high translation quality with low latency. Recent work introduced REINA, a method that trains a Read/Write policy based on estimating the information gain of reading more audio. However, we find that information-based policies often lack temporal context, leading the policy to bias itself toward reading most of the audio before starting to write. We improve REINA using two distinct strategies: a supervised alignment network (REINA-SAN) and a timestep-augmented network (REINA-TAN). Our results demonstrate that while both methods significantly outperform the baseline and resolve stability issues, REINA-TAN provides a slightly superior Pareto frontier for streaming efficiency, whereas REINA-SAN offers more robustness against 'read loops'. Applied to Whisper, both methods improve the pareto frontier of streaming efficiency as measured by Normalized Streaming Efficiency (NoSE) scores up to 7.1% over existing competitive baselines.

</details>


### [372] [A Tale of Two Temperatures: Simple, Efficient, and Diverse Sampling from Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09921)
*Theo X. Olausson,Metod Jazbec,Xi Wang,Armando Solar-Lezama,Christian A. Naesseth,Stephan Mandt,Eric Nalisnick*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用软化温度调节的置信度重掩码启发式方法，可以在保持计算效率的同时提高扩散语言模型的采样多样性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注扩散语言模型采样的速度与质量权衡，但如何确保样本间的多样性问题仍未得到充分理解

Method: 引入软化（温度调节）版本的置信度重掩码启发式方法，通过引入理想化的分叉令牌形式模型，研究重掩码对分叉处期望熵的影响

Result: 提出的温度调节启发式方法缩小了现有置信度采样与自回归采样之间的探索差距（pass@k），在控制成本（pass@NFE）时表现优于两者
